faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.question: Which Aviation degree programme should I pursue?
faqs.answer:
It depends on what candidates mean by an Aviation professional. By far the easier and better job is that of a pilot. If candidates are young (aged 12-18), it is recommended that they pursue a general course of study. Take as many Maths and Science courses as possible. It may appear unusual to study Geography and Geology, but candidates would want to know what they are looking at.
The most common aviation degree programme is the Bachelor of Science in Aviation. This degree provides a broad understanding of the Aviation industry, covering topics such as aviation regulations, safety, management, and operations. Graduates with this degree can pursue careers as pilots, air traffic controllers, airport managers, and more.

reviews_list.review_title: The fee structure of this college is not reasonable.

review_content.Placements: Many students got internships in this course. Placements are decent. There are no top recruiting companies that visit our college for recruitment. Top roles are offered in this course. Few students got unpaid internships in this course.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma In Medical Lab Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college and would recommend joining it.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of students get placed in our course. It is a paramedical course and these technicians play a major role in diagnosing various alignments. The average salary package offered is 1 LPA to 5 LPA. Placements are provided in both government and private hospitals in our course. The roles offered are research technician, lab consultant, technologist, research assistant, lab analyst, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are convenient for students to study. Hostels are built inside and outside the institute. Food served in the hostel is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Fashion Technology (Advance) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is the right place to pursue fashion designing.

review_content.Placements: I have done an advanced Diploma in fashion technology from YWCA. The packages offered are good (1.5 to 5 LPA). The teachers train the students for interviews. Around 70 to 80% of students got placed. I got placed in Uniform Bucket as a fashion merchandiser.
review_content.Infrastructure: YWCA is a pocket-friendly place, where you can get really good knowledge, both theoretical and practical. The teachers are good and friendly. Computer and personality development classes are also conducted with the course. I am from Meerut. I shifted to Delhi and stayed in the YWCA hostel. The hostel is a perfect place to stay for college students. Mess and all the other facilities are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Office Management - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Perfectly satisfied from YWCA of Delhi.

review_content.Placements: About 50 students were in my class and there were four sections of office management course. 40-50 students were in each section. When I was studying in YWCA. I did the internship also for one month in central Water Commission (CWC) and after completing the course minimum package offer was 15-20 thousand. When I completed the course before that only the covid pandemic started so till the lockdown no placement was provided but I am fully satisfied that even after one year of passing out from the college the teachers and the placement department is still in touch with us and are still providing the required jobs. Each and every student got internship from the college as it's compulsory for every student to do internship before completing the course and the companies were Dabor Ltd. , Central Water Commission, BSES. Office coordinator, office assistant, front office executive, these were the roles offered.

fees_overview.description: At YWCA Women's Training institute, courses are available at multiple levels, including UG, PG and Certificate levels. Each course has its own fee structure, which includes components, such as the tuition fee, hostel charges, and refundable deposits. Only applicants who have cleared the admission procedure, are allowed to make the payment. For course-wise YWCA Women's Training institute fee details, students can visit the official website of the institute.

course_details.course_description: UG Diploma is a 5 months - 1 year course offered by YWCA Women's Training institute in the Full Time mode. Candidates are shortlisted for the same through YWCA Women's Training institute admission process. The course fee for UG Diploma varies with different specialisations of the course. Candidate h

The fee for Certificate at YWCA Women's Training institute is valid for a duration of 3 months - 6 months. Candidates need to pay a deposit at the time of admission to confirm their seat. Candidates must pay the tuition fee of INR 18,500 - 52,000 at the time of admission to confirm the seat in YWCA

The total course fee for PG Diploma offered by YWCA Women's Training institute depends upon the specialisation opted by the candidate. The course fee ranges between INR 60,600 - 80,000. overview_faqs.question: Is YWCA Women's Training institute a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: YWCA Women's Training institute is a reputed institute for PG Diploma, UG Diploma, Certificate. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Mass Communication & Media, Hospitality & Travel, Beauty & Fitness, Humanities & Social Sciences, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Animation, IT & Software, Design, Medicine & Health Sciences, Aviation. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. YWCA Women's Training institute has a review rating of 3.8 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.3 on campuslife, 4 on placements, 4.3 on faculty and 3.8 on Infrastructure.

BTech and MBA are the popular programmes offered at the university. Below-mentioned are Vikrant University popular programmes:

Offered every semester

faqs.answer: The MBA eligibility requires candidates to have completed their graduation in any field (Science, Commerce, Arts) with an aggregate of 50% or more. Students can also check the list of reasons below to pursue MBA course from Vikrant University:Promising Career: The simplest approach to advance your career is to earn a Master of Business Administration. Students concentrate on the employment possibilities that follow earning a Master of Business Administration. MBA courses are becoming increasingly important to have managerial abilities and expertise as the globe becomes more and more competitive.Develop Management Skills: Numerous Specialisations in Master of Business Administration enable students to concentrate on any specific area of business management. Each speciality aids students in developing a career in that particular industry. Entrepreneurship Abilities: Students learn about operating a business. For college students with a family company, this is particularly beneficial. The business will operate more efficiently and generate better returns thanks to the Master of Business Administration.

Candidates must pass graduation or equivalent to apply for the M.Tech course.

review_summary.college_name: Vikrant University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Vikrant University.

content.Placements: I don't remember the exact number, but a lot of students from my batch have got placed, and the average package is Rs. 2.5 Lacs per annum. The highest package is around 8 to 10 Lacs per annum, and the average package is around 2.5 Lacs per annum. A lot of companies come, like Gal India Pvt. Ltd. and VPS Pvt. Ltd., etc. Around 25 to 30% of students got placed in my batch. They offer many roles like fire safety engineer, IT engineer, consultant, system engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure here is good, and the faculty is also fine. They mingle well with the students and are not pressurized too much. The faculty here is such that their method of studying is very different, and they teach very well. Every year, events and organizations like tournaments are organized here, in which anyone from the city can take part and win a lot of prizes.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors in Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Yes, all are good for placement, and the overall experience is also good.

content.Placements: Placement is average. Those students who are good in our course and are placed in a company are the highest, approximately 10 Lacs. The lowest is 3 Lacs. For internships, 100% of students get an internship. Annual income is not good, but placement is good not any problem. If you are good in studies, you should take up placement .
content.Infrastructure: They don't have any hostel. All students take their own house rent. They have their own room and canteen. There are 3 canteen. They have an Amul canteen, but one canteen is not good. The other 2 are the best in food and food quality are best in our college in sport field, they are the best because they are the best. They have all grounds.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Microbiology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall, I would like to say that this is one of the best colleges I have ever researched.

content.Placements: I can't say in percentage, but most of the students got placements in the best companies. They provide the best packages. Around 80-85% of students got internships from this college. Our college is very good and tries to give you the best knowledge and placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides library facilities. The environment of our college library is peaceful. Our provides Wi-Fi to improve the skills to study and grow to gain knowledge. Our classrooms are huge. Their environment is very friendly.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A great infrastructure with facilities, but fell short of faculty and placments in 2023.

content.Placements: Placement rates for BBA from top institutes can be 100%, while for mid-tier institutes, it can range between 60% - 80%. The average salary package was 3 LPA - 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include BCG, Amazon, Brain, IBM, Microsoft, and top consulting and finance firms.
content.Infrastructure: For a BBA course, facilities and infrastructure generally provide a conducive environment for both academic learning and extracurricular activities. Computer labs are equipped with business-related software and tools for data analysis. Smart classrooms are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am living a very amazing college life at Vikrant University.

content.Placements: Only 20 percent of the students were placed in Computer Science. The highest package is 70 LPA, the average package is 4 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. Google and Microsoft are also recruiting from Vikrant University. 40 percent of students got internships in some companies like Innoctor EduTech and RoboTech. Software Engineer is a top role in Computer Science.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are well maintained and infrastructure is also good. All the necessary things are available, like: Wi-Fi, laboratories, cricket ground, classrooms, technical laboratories, and library. The canteen is average, but medical facilities, sports, and games are amazing.

faqs.question: Who can enroll for admission at Vikrant University?

paragraphs: Vikrant University admissionsare primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to the course. The admission process at Vikrant University is below:-
Vikrant University Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online/offline. For UG and PG courses, candidates must visit the official website and for the PhD courses, students can either apply online or offline. The application fee for PhD course is INR 2,000. To apply offline for the PhD course, students must go to the institute campus. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website.

The university accepts entrance exam scores such as GATE and JEE Main for admission to the MTech & BTech courses. For PhD course admission, candidates are selected based on in-house entrance exam scores, VU Research Aptitude Test followed by PI.
Merit List & Admission Confirmation

After the release of theVikrant University cutoff, it also releases a merit list based on the score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted students need to come for document verification and pay theVikrant University feeto confirm their seats in the university.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to various courses at Vikrant University?
faqs.answer: Vikrant University admissions are entrance-based. The university considers national-level entrance exam scores for various course admission. The mode of application is online/offline. For UG and PG courses, candidates must visit the official website and for the PhD courses, aspirants can either apply online or offline. The application fee for PhD course is INR 2,000. To apply offline for the PhD course, students must visit the institute campus. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website. Selected candidates must keep their educational documents ready for verification purposes.

faqs.question: Are admissions to various courses open at Vikrant University?
faqs.answer: Vikrant University admissions are currently open for various courses. The university offers courses such as BTech, BCA, MBA, M.Tech etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers certificate, diploma, PhD and vocational courses. Vikrant University admission 2025 is entrance-based for PhD courses. However, candidates are selected based on merit for the rest of the course level, i.e., UG, PG, Certificate, Diploma and Vocational. Interested candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can fill out the form.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vikrant University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is good, and the faculty is also fine. They mingle well with the students and are not pressurized too much. The faculty here is such that their method of studying is very different, and they teach very well. Every year, events and organizations like tournaments are organized here, in which anyone from the city can take part and win a lot of prizes.

reviews.review_heading: Yes, all are good for placement, and the overall experience is also good.
reviews.review_text: They don't have any hostel. All students take their own house rent. They have their own room and canteen. There are 3 canteen. They have an Amul canteen, but one canteen is not good. The other 2 are the best in food and food quality are best in our college in sport field, they are the best because they are the best. They have all grounds.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I would like to say that this is one of the best colleges I have ever researched.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides library facilities. The environment of our college library is peaceful. Our provides Wi-Fi to improve the skills to study and grow to gain knowledge. Our classrooms are huge. Their environment is very friendly.

reviews.review_heading: A great infrastructure with facilities, but fell short of faculty and placments in 2023.
reviews.review_text: For a BBA course, facilities and infrastructure generally provide a conducive environment for both academic learning and extracurricular activities. Computer labs are equipped with business-related software and tools for data analysis. Smart classrooms are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am living a very amazing college life at Vikrant University.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are well maintained and infrastructure is also good. All the necessary things are available, like: Wi-Fi, laboratories, cricket ground, classrooms, technical laboratories, and library. The canteen is average, but medical facilities, sports, and games are amazing.

reviews.review_heading: A step towards a bright future and career.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of my college is so good. The environment, classrooms, computer lab, Science lab, and Wi-Fi facility are good. In my department, facilities are good.
Eight ceiling fans are in every classroom. The seating system is also good.
I have not used the hostel facilities, but the canteen is not very good and does not offer a wide variety of food. A medical facility is also on my campus, and it is good for emergency purposes. Sports and many games are also played on my campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college with good facilities and motivated teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent facilities. The quality of food is good and healthy. Computer labs are good. Many books are available in the library. Games and sports teachers are available. Indoor and outdoor games are provided by this university. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vikrant University.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available. Our classrooms are clean. There is a library and a canteen. There are 3-4 buildings, one for management, one for technical, and another for administration. There is sufficient space in classrooms to study.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vikrant University.
reviews.review_text: The college is painted, so it looks good. A huge playground is available. Many games are played, like basketball, cricket, etc. There is a canteen, a washroom, and an excellent computer lab. We also have a library.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent university in the Gwalior region as well as in Madhya Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus, like in libraries, labs, etc., The college is under CCTV surveillance. Our classrooms are good. The canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent university in Gwalior.
reviews.review_text: There is a separate department for B.Tech. The campus is neat and clean. There are many classrooms. A canteen is available. The quality of food in the canteen is good. There are many labs, like chemistry, physics, mechanical labs, etc. Workshop facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best university in Gwalior.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. It has advanced labs for practical learning, a central library, an auditorium, sports grounds and facilities, drinking water, a canteen, etc. Classrooms are well-lighted and spacious.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good atmosphere for education.
reviews.review_text: Library of our college is good. Canteen is available. There are good classrooms and medical facilities. Our college provides good sports teachers.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vikrant Institute of Technology and Management, Gwalior.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. The campus has a playground, where all the engineering and management students can play lots of sports. In my opinion, the infrastructure is good. There are several buildings for academics.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Gwalior.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is one of the best infrastructures in Gwalior city. It has free Wi-Fi, has a medium-size library which is also a digital library. Classroom of our college in just like as hall of a house, about 100-120 student can sit in one time.

faqs.answer: A:    Supply Chains Management is a part of Retail Management. Companies that have a huge network of goods and raw materials hire MBA graduates who specialise in Supply Chain Management. The course teaches the students to control and plan the inflow and outflow of products or raw materials to the consumers. review_summary.college_name: Jamshedpur Womens College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The overall university is okay, but the placement is not good enough.

content.Placements: The placement of this college is very bad for BCA students. None of our seniors got placed. The teachers would guide you for internships, but there aren't many internships provided by the college. You should not depend on this college for placements, but you can definitely find off-campus placements.
content.Infrastructure: There is a library. Students need to apply for a library card before borrowing books from the library. For BCA department, there are two labs, and some of the systems are not working right now. Hostel rooms in the new campus are quite good. Each room consists of two beds with a table and almirah each. The food is okay.

content.Placements: In my college Jamshedpur Women's College I have opted for B.A. with history honours. Approximately 70% of students are there in this course. Since I am currently pursuing my graduation, I am not aware of the package and recruitment. I am not aware of the internship programs.

reviews.review_heading: The overall university is okay, but the placement is not good enough.
reviews.review_text: There is a library. Students need to apply for a library card before borrowing books from the library. For BCA department, there are two labs, and some of the systems are not working right now. Hostel rooms in the new campus are quite good. Each room consists of two beds with a table and almirah each. The food is okay.

reviews.review_heading: The university is okay. The placement is the major issue.
reviews.review_text: There is a library. Students need to apply for a library card before borrowing books. For the BCA department, there are two labs, but some of the systems are not working right now. Hostel rooms in the new campus are quite good. Each room consists of two beds, a table, and an almirah. The food is okay.

reviews.review_heading: A summary of my college journey.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a well-maintained library with AC and non-AC compartments. Classes and the library have Wi-Fi. We have a well-maintained canteen with lots of delicious snacks at an affordable price. There is an indoor stadium where co-curricular activities are often held. The whole college campus is clean and has calm vibes.

reviews.review_heading: Review of our university.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure, classrooms, and facilities of our college are good. As I was one of the students who stayed in the hostel for almost 1 year, I knew about the food quality, which is very nice. We also have some sports where the girls are doing very well.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty members, really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college come up with all the facilities which fulfill all the requirements of students. We have proper and big classroom, labs, with good Wi-Fi, a projector, and a library where we can issue books which we want. About the hostel, rooms provided for the students are quite small but are good for a single student to stay. We have a canteen for cooked food and snacks as well. I am not aware of the medical facilities but we do have sports and games. NCC and all are held.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied because of placement facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is basic neither too grand nor dangerous. College provides hostel facilities to students who required it. Hotel quality is quite good and food provided is tasty and healthy. Full security is provided to students.

reviews.review_heading: Good Infrastructure and the best faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Lecture halls, library, and auditorium were all available for our department. Hostels were pretty much decent. The quality of food being served in canteen is good with affordable prices for students. Sports and games were given attention. An indoor stadium is available for all such activities related to sports.

reviews.review_heading: Best infrastructure and facilities, good placements in 2022.
reviews.review_text: Our BCA department had a separate lab and lecture halls were also available at the top floor. Smart boards were also installed. Hostel facilities were also quite good with general rules, and mess and canteen food was also good and budget-friendly for students. NCC club was also very good. Apart from that, sports and games were also given special attention.

reviews.review_heading: A good college for girls pursuing a bachelor's or master's degree.
reviews.review_text: There are two campuses. One is in Bistupur, and another is in Sidghora. The new Sidhgora Campus can be given 5 out 5 with excellent facilities. It has a lift, digital as well as traditional classrooms, and a library. I am a day scholar, so I don't know much about the hostel. The new campus is good. The old one is average.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for women.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are very good, but the washrooms are not well maintained. The new campus in Sidhgora is excellent, and everything is perfect. They motivate and help those interested in sports or other activities, but the food in the canteen is not very good.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review for future assistance .
reviews.review_text: A couple of hostels besides the playground and accommodation facilities for the staff spread across 8 acres of land. The state-of-the-art new campus with 9 floors comprises an administration block, faculty members of sciences, commerce, humanities and social sciences, and vocational studies, with a centralized library and a 500-bed women's hostel, spreading across 17 acres of land.

reviews.review_heading: The college helps to achieve our goals .
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure was so good and well maintained. 
In my course, the classrooms were well maintained, and the library is also good, but they need to enhance more.
The quality of the facilities in the hostel was also good, and the food quality is also good. 
They provide all the facilities and sports and games are also available .

reviews.review_heading: Faculty provides good facilities and teachers guide you very well .
reviews.review_text:
Our new campus, which is in sidhgora is best and the infrastructure is so good and well maintained. 
Classrooms are cleaned and their is also a projector for maximum classes.
Hostel facilities are good; they give you proper food. 
And all the facilities are available for hostel students, like sports and games, whatever they want to do.

reviews.review_heading: Go for this degree and study hard.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. The labs and classrooms are too good. Library facilities are there having lots of books. Hostel facilities are provided with good quality facilities. Canteen facility is there providing different types of food items. Sports and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: For studies, it is an absolutely amazing college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are really good. Wi-Fi is available in the labs. There is a library with lots of books provided. The classrooms are neat and clean offering different courses. Hostel facilities are provided for the students. A canteen is available with hygienic food. Medical and sports facilities are also there.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Jamshedpur Womens College ,Kolhan University

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with our college. It is the best campus ever.

review_content.Placements: There were only 40 students, out of which only 23 passed the exam. The ones who passed will get internships in different hospitals. The top roles are doctors, pharmacists, and compounders. The salary package will be Rs. 30,000 per month for an internship and Rs. 40, 000 per month for house staff.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are well-organised and clean. Great facilities are there. The food is provided in the hostel. There is an e-lab, a pathology lab, a computer lab, and a library. A pharmacy is also there, and the quality of the Wi-Fi is great. There is an air conditioner in the auditorium.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It provides good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides BHMS and MD courses for medical aspirant students. Admission is based on NEET UG merit ranking basis. The minimum qualification criteria are higher secondary, and students should be pass out from subjects like Physics, Chemistry and Biology with 50% marks. It is totally run by the government of West Bengal. According to the government fee scale, education cost depends here, and no extra charge is payable for students. All pass out students gets a chance to do an internship in home institution and other government institutions. Most of the students get a chance to enlist their names in the MD course.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college is quite good.

content.Placements: Our college is new, so our college does not provide placement facilities because the past 2 or 3 years passed through covid. Students won't get placed in college after a B.Pharma degree. Students will take admission to an M.Pharma course instead of a job.
content.Infrastructure: Our college does not provide good facilities. I will rate 2.5 out of 5. Wi-Fi facility is not available in our college. There is no proper network in our college. The food served in the canteen is average. There is no xerox shop, cyber cafe, shops and transport around the college, you have to go about 8-9 km from the college. Our college is outside of the city 10-11 km.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college is surrounded by hills with large campus.

content.Placements: Many companies are invited for the campus selection of the students. Most of the students are provided a placement on the campus. Best amenities are provided to the students. Teachers are very helpful. Practical lectures are conducted on regular mode.
content.Infrastructure: It provides a very good facility. College posses the canteen facilities which are very good and helpful for every student. All the facilities for the students are maintained timely. Classrooms and corridor sections are big. Our college looks for the proper ventilation.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Very good college and at good price.

content.Placements: Placement is fair from my college. The lowest salary was 2.5 Lacs pa. the highest was 3.5 Lacs in 2018 The top roles offered from my college are D.pharm B.Pharma and M.pharm The teaching staff is supportive and gives good response to students. Mainly students are from nearby areas.
content.Infrastructure: There are good labs present. Infrastructure is good. The classroom is good. The library has good facilities like a book bank for SC-ST students. Canteen is fairly good like tea coffee and some Indian snacks. The mess is private and would be very good ranging from 1800 to 2200 per month. There are no sports facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college in all aspects.

content.Placements: The highest salary package offered was 87.10 LPA. The top recruiting company was Cipla. About 25% of students got placed in our college. About 50% of students got internships from our college in Cipla and Dr. Reddy's Laboratories. The salary package offered for interns was Rs. 4,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus was Wi-Fi enabled. Our labs were fully equipped. Our library was filled with books and magazines. The food served in the canteen and mess was the best and provided a variety of food items.
content.Faculty: Teachers were very helpful. They always cleared our doubts. Their teaching quality was good. Our college organised industrial and hospital visits for students. Exams were easy.

highlights.summary: A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
The BTech and MTech programmes offered at the Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University are very popular among the students. The university offers a four-year BTech programme and a two-year MTech programme in numerous specialisations. Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University offers a BTech programme in the Marathi language. Specifically, they offer the Electronics and Telecommunications Engineering branch in the Marathi medium. The program is initiated under the NEP 2020 initiative. The popularity of these programmes is attributed to their curriculum, which has been developed and upgraded to enhance the knowledge of students in various branches of Engineering and Technology.
DBATU aims at the holistic development of students and helps them to develop technical competencies as well as various soft skills required to target core-industry roles. The university offers placement assistance to students and helps them get placed in top companies. The notable DBATU recruiters, include TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Amazon, Bosch, Capgemini, and HCL, among others. Additionally, DBATU offers MBA and MCA programmes, such as Innovation, Entrepreneurship, Venture Development (IEV), and Computer Applications. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by DBATU and their respective eligibility and Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University fee structure:

placements.overview:
DBATU course admissions are entrance-based. The university offers the BTech programme at the UG level and the MTech programme at the PG level. For admission to its BTech programme, the Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University accepts at least 45% aggregate in Class 12 and the JEE Mains exam scorecard. However, for Maharashtra candidates, MHT CET score is considered by the University for granting admission. Admission to the MTech programme is done on the basis of the candidate's performance in GATE. Interested candidates can apply online on the official website of DBATU.

The mode of the DBATU application process is online. After qualifying for the respective entrance exams, interested candidates must apply for the relevant counselling sessions to gain admission to various courses offered by DBATU. Some of the essential documents required at the time of are listed below:

faqs.answer: A:    The fee for the MBA program at Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University (DBATU) is approximately INR 40,000 for the academic fees, INR 2,000 for examination fees, and approximately INR 35,000 for hostel charges, which depend on the room chosen. faqs.answer: A:    Admission to the BArch programme of Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University is entirely merit-based on the NATA exam. The candidates need to secure the qualifying score in NATA for being eligible for admission. No other alternative test is accepted by the university for BArch. Final selection is done through counselling and allotment of seats.
faqs.question: What entrance exam is required for BArch at Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University?

faqs.answer: A:    To take admission in BArch at Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University, students must pass Class 12 with Mathematics as a mandatory subject. At least 50% aggregate is a must for general category students. SC, ST, and PwD Maharashtra State candidates require at least 45%. Also, students must possess a valid NATA score for admission.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BArch at Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University?

The shortlisted candidates should attend the counselling procedure and select DBATU Lonere as their priority during the choice-filling and locking process. faqs.question: Q: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?

faqs.answer: Established in 1989, Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University (DBATU) is a unitary, Maharashtra state Technological University in Lonere, Maharashtra. It is named after Babasaheb Ambedkar, a prominent Indian jurist, economist, politician and social reformer. The university is recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC), the Association of Indian Universities (AIU), and is accredited by NAAC with a 'B' grade. Presently, more than 415 institutes are affiliated with the University, and the total student strength is 2 lakh. Popular courses at DBATU include BE/ BTech, MTech, and MCA. DBATU admission to BTech is done through the JEE Mains entrance examinations, followed by counselling. According to the DBATU placements, the median package stood at INR 4.5 LPA.

overview_faqs.question: Why choose Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University?
overview_faqs.answer: Established in 1989, Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University (DBATU) is a unitary, Maharashtra state Technological University in Lonere, Maharashtra. It is named after Babasaheb Ambedkar, a prominent Indian jurist, economist, politician and social reformer. The university is recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC), the Association of Indian Universities (AIU), and is accredited by NAAC with a 'B' grade. Presently, more than 415 institutes are affiliated with the University, and the total student strength is 2 lakh. Popular courses at DBATU include BE/ BTech, MTech, and MCA. DBATU admission to BTech is done through the JEE Mains entrance examinations, followed by counselling. According to the DBATU placements, the median package stood at INR 4.5 LPA.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for DBATU?
overview_faqs.answer: The fee for the MBA program at Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University (DBATU) is approximately INR 40,000 for the academic fees, INR 2,000 for examination fees, and approximately INR 35,000 for hostel charges, which depend on the room chosen. The non-academic/developmental fees vary and any other necessary fees are additional. For the B.Tech program, the fees are approximately INR 60,000 for the first year, varying based on the specialization chosen.

review_summary.college_name: DBATU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Really good college to become a professional pharmacist.

content.Placements: There are about 70-80 percent of students who got placed by college in top-most industries. The highest package is 3 LPA. Students get placed in positions like quality control and quality assurance. In this course, there are so many job opportunities available in the industry.
content.Infrastructure: There are so many facilities present in college, like the library, the best classroom, the canteen, etc. Hostels are much better than outside PG. Medical facilities are also present in the hostel. For sports, there are huge groups. The mess food is much better than that in other canteens.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty, placements, and the college infrastructure.

content.Placements: The placement rate at Srinath College of Pharmacy is gradually increasing because of the right support from the faculty members and the placement cell and their training sessions, many students from our course get placed in various roles and companies. The average package offered for freshers is moderate while some students get good packages because of their knowledge, practical skills, and performance, many students get internships in various companies with an average percentage. Many students get into the pharmaceutical industry and medical representative roles.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is good but lacks proper facilities.

content.Placements: The college does not have placements, only 10-20 students get placed by the college. The average package provided is Rs 2,40,000 by the college. No internships are offered by the college. Top recruiter companies in the course are around this area. Top roles offered are pharmacist, MR, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good but it doesn't contain good canteen and garden. The playground is not developed. Classrooms do not contain proper working projector. Labs are there but not designed properly and no cleaning is maintained. The food quality of the mess is low.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Best college for B. Pharmacy.

content.Placements: Approximately 60-70 percent of students from our course got successfully placed through campus and off-campus opportunities. The highest package offered is around 4.5 LPA-5 LPA, mainly for roles in pharmaceutical sales and management or clinical research. The lowest package range between 1.8 LPA and 2 LPA, while the average package stood at approximately 2.5 LPA-3 LPA. College has good placement for students college gives placement in big companies like Cipla, Sun Pharma. More than 50 percent of students get placement and internship, and colleges also provide a package between 5 LPA and 5.50 LPA. Colleges provide a package from higher to average.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The amazing education provided by Srinath College of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: Srinath College of Pharmacy is an excellent college for pharmacy, D Pharmacy and M.Pharma. There are a total of 108 students in the first-year batch, divided into two divisions. The highest package to get offered is 3.5 to 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Wockhardt Company, Ajanta Pharmaceuticals, Sun Pharmaceutical Industries, and Cipla Limited. The top roles offered in the course are Researcher, Doctorate, and Lab Technician.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus is very clean, and the infrastructure is very beautiful. There are different departments regarding degree subjects and extracurricular activities. The classrooms are very spacious, and the college provides a great environment to learn and to grow.

admission_overview.title: Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University - DBATU Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Dr Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University (DBATU) admissions 2025 are based on national- and state-level entrance examinations. DBATU is a state-level autonomous university situated at Raigad, Maharashtra, and was established in 1989. The university is NAAC Grade 'B' accredited. UG, PG, PhD, and diploma courses are offered by the university in the streams of Engineering, Pharmacy, and Architecture. DBATU UG admissions are through JEE Main, MHT CET, NATA, and Class 12 merit, while GATE is accepted for MTech. PhD admissions are via a university-level entrance exam and a Personal Interview, with the whole process being online.

admission_process.title: Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University - DBATU Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Dr Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University (DBATU) admissions 2025 are made on the basis of national- and state-level entrance exams. DBATU is a state-level autonomous government university established in 1989 and accredited with NAAC Grade 'B'. DBATU is situated at Raigad, Maharashtra. The university conducts UG, PG, PhD, and diploma programmes under Engineering, Pharmacy, and Architecture. Admissions are online through the official website as per course-wise eligibility.

The application mode is online via the official website. Candidates have to submit the application form according to their desired course. The application involves uploading academic information and documents, along with paying the required fee online through debit/credit card or net banking.

DBATU accepts students on the basis of national/state-level entry tests and merit. BTech is via JEE Main or MHT CET (for Maharashtra applicants), BArch via NATA, and BPharm via Class 12 marks. MTech intake accepts GATE, and PhD shortlisting is via a university-level entry test followed by a Personal Interview (PI).

Following the entrance shortlisting, DBATU publishes course-wise merit lists. Those candidates who obtain the cutoff scores are allotted seats in their preferred programme. Shortlisted candidates need to authenticate their documents and pay theDBATU admission feeonline to secure their seats in the university.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted for BTech admission at Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University?
faqs.answer: Admission to the BTech course of Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University is on the basis of a valid JEE Main score. Maharashtra state students also get a chance through scores in MHT CET. The university makes merit lists as per ranks in entrance exams. faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BArch at Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University?
faqs.answer: To take admission in BArch at Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University, students must pass Class 12 with Mathematics as a mandatory subject. At least 50% aggregate is a must for general category students. SC, ST, and PwD Maharashtra State candidates require at least 45%. Also, students must possess a valid NATA score for admission.

faqs.question: What entrance exam is required for BArch at Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University?
faqs.answer: Admission to the BArch programme of Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University is entirely merit-based on the NATA exam. The candidates need to secure the qualifying score in NATA for being eligible for admission. No other alternative test is accepted by the university for BArch. Final selection is done through counselling and allotment of seats.

faqs.question: What is the duration of the BArch course at Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University?
faqs.answer: The Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University offers the BArch programme at the UG level. The course is offered in both four-year and five-year duration courses. Architectural design, planning, and associated fields are trained in by students during the programme. The intake is only made to qualified candidates who meet both academic and entrance examination criteria.

faqs.question: Can I get admission to DBATU for MBA with 60% in Class 12th?
faqs.answer: Yes, you may get admission to Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Technological University (DBATU) for an MBA program with 60% in Class 12th. The eligibility criteria for the MBA program at DBATU do not have a specification for Class 12th marks, but rather for the graduation level. Admission to the MBA program is typically based on entrance exam scores such as MAH MBA CET and the candidate's performance in the qualifying examination.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Srinath College of PharmacyReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Really good college to become a professional pharmacist.
reviews.review_text: There are so many facilities present in college, like the library, the best classroom, the canteen, etc. Hostels are much better than outside PG. Medical facilities are also present in the hostel. For sports, there are huge groups. The mess food is much better than that in other canteens.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Srinath College of PharmacyReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty, placements, and the college infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the B. Pharmacy course at our college is good, providing various facilities for hostels with spacious classrooms, library, and reference books, basic Wi-Fi facilities are available on campus, the food is average but manageable sometimes, and many sports and cultural events are conducted to engage students beyond just studies.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Delight College of PharmacyReviewed on 7 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is good but lacks proper facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good but it doesn't contain good canteen and garden. The playground is not developed. Classrooms do not contain proper working projector. Labs are there but not designed properly and no cleaning is maintained. The food quality of the mess is low.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Srinath College of PharmacyReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Best college for B. Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: The college has very nice infrastructure. It has good laboratories for practical experiments. The college has a hotel facility, and a boys' hostel is outside the college campus. The hostel also has good meal quality, and it is also a good college with a lab, and many books are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Srinath College of PharmacyReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The amazing education provided by Srinath College of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is very clean, and the infrastructure is very beautiful. There are different departments regarding degree subjects and extracurricular activities. The classrooms are very spacious, and the college provides a great environment to learn and to grow.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Maharashtra Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 7 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good college in all things.
reviews.review_text: In the classroom, there is no facility for Wi-Fi. The Wi-Fi is only present in the labs for students. Labs are very good for the CSE department. The AC facility is only available in some labs, not all the labs have AC. Classsrooms are big with an intake capacity of 80 students. The college has two canteens, one is big and one is small. College does not provide things for the sports and games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Srinath College of PharmacyReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My excellent and beautiful college life.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is very clean, and the infrastructure is very beautiful. There are different departments regarding degree subjects and extracurricular activities. The college faculty is very supportive, kind, and helpful in case of any doubts.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Srinath College of PharmacyReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college those who want to do B.Pharmacy or D.Pharmacy, they can go for it.
reviews.review_text: Digital classrooms are there. Efficient amount of books are available in the library for a particular course. Mess and canteen facilities are available. Bus transport facilities are available. Sports and games are also conducted. Experimental labs are also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Srinath College of PharmacyReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Very good and supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure and facilities are good, hostels are well maintained, and in one room, 5 beds are available, a mess and canteen are available in college premises, a library is also available in college, and all books are available, there is no need to purchase books.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Srinath College of PharmacyReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: College assessed job prospects, salary, and support highlight key factors.
reviews.review_text: The college focuses on facilities like classrooms, labs, libraries, and Wi-Fi. We also have hostel rooms like classrooms, and a sports ground, assessing their modernity, cleanliness, and sufficiency for a leading academic space. We also had smart classrooms. The college was so beautiful, and Wi-Fi connectivity had speed coverage. We also had a digital learning tool and a big computer lab. This was my dream college and was very beautiful.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Srinath College of PharmacyReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the faculty, good placements in 2024.
reviews.review_text: There are labs in our college for doing practical and understanding the concept. Classrooms and the library are good. Hostel facilities are good on average. The quality of food is really not good. About the mess, it's not good to taste, to digest, and so on. Getting too many students are suffering from food poisoning. The canteen also has costly snacks. No medical facility. Sports are good. Give all permission to play and enjoy.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Srinath College of PharmacyReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Educational standards and academic environment at Srinath College of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at Srinath College of Pharmacy is suitable for academic learning, with properly equipped labs, a peaceful campus, and hostel facilities that are safe and convenient for students. The college has decent infrastructure for the pharmacy course.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Chhatrapati Shahu College of EngineeringReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Very good college. I will recommend this college to students.
reviews.review_text: There is a huge library which has over thousands of books and a study point also. 24 hours Wi-Fi and good cleanliness in classrooms and library. There are 2 boys’ hostels and 3–4 girls’ hostels, where we have 24 hours Wi-Fi. There are 2 canteens which are affordable too.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Chhatrapati Shahu College of EngineeringReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Strict in studies, but teaching quality is great.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our department are great. There are multiple labs with connected Wi-Fi, around 18 classrooms, and a library inside the department. We also have a Mac lab in our department, which is the only one in the whole college. The hostel is pretty good, the quality of the canteen is average, medical facilities are good, and sports and games are average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Srinath College of PharmacyReviewed on 19 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: All about Srinath College of Pharmacy, Aurangabad.
reviews.review_text: There were many facilities available in our college for girls, a special common room was provided. Hostels and the cafeteria were on the campus itself. The infrastructure of the college, as well as the hostel, was very good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication (Honours/ Research) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Great learning and experience from Amity.

review_content.Placements: The placements provided at Amity are good. Top media houses visited the campus for placement. The package ranges from 4-7 LPA. Many students from my batch went for higher education. Internship opportunities are provided to the students based on their interests and skills.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure provided for learning is excellent. The studio is equipped with all the necessary equipment for our learning. The classrooms have Wi-Fi. The library has books for all departments. It has computers for e-learning where students can access journals. The hostel facility is good. They provide two sharing rooms. There are 3 hostels currently. There are common rooms, game rooms, and a dance room for students' engagement. The mess area is quite big, accommodation for the students. The food provided is to suits everyone's taste. The medical staff is available for the students' help.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Well-structured curriculum and good placements.

review_content.Placements: In my batch out of the strength of 79 students, almost 40 percent of students got an on-campus placement with the highest offer of 19 LPA and an average of 5 LPA. 30 percent of students went for higher education. Top roles offered in our courses include Software Developer, Data Analyst, Software Engineer, etc. Recruiting companies include LearningRoutes, PlanetSpark, QSpiders, IBM, Genpact, and more.
review_content.Infrastructure: Overall, our college has a good infrastructure having all the required labs, with high-speed internet connections available for all the students. Our college has a wide range of books available in high-class libraries and has a vast collection of books, research papers, and digital resources. The hostel facilities are designed for our comfort and convenience, offering both AC and non-AC rooms with essential amenities like Wi-Fi, Laundry, and security.

overview_faqs.question: What is the BTech fee at Amity University Raipur?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Amity Raipur BTech ranges between INR 3.7 lakh and INR 7.60 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. After completion of the selection rounds, candidates need to pay a fee to confirm their seat. overview_faqs.question: Is Amity University Raipur good for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: Amity University Raipur is one of the reputed Institute of India which is established in 2014 by Ritnand Balved Education Foundation. It is a good Institute for MBA in HR and IB as they are providing 100% placement assistance to the students. Their the highest package is around 47 LPA where as their average package is around 6 LPA which is a good return on Investment as their fee structure is between 440000 to 776000.

review_summary.college_name: Amity University Raipur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) (Honours/ Research) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the campus is good.

content.Placements: The BBA course sees around 70 percent placements and roles, mainly in sales, business development, and HR. 80 percent of the students have secured internships in finance, marketing, and HR. Companies like Flipkart, Renault, etc., hire students for major roles like sales, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is totally good for the BBA and hostel, and the facilities provided are also good. Facilities in the hostel have been improved and now they take proper care of everything. There are useless restrictions that are imposed on students that need to be stopped.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The university has a great performance in Chhattisgarh.

content.Placements: Approximately 75% of students are placed at the university every year. The highest package goes across 30 LPA, and the lowest package goes across 8 LPA. The university provides different courses for the students to make their future bright as well, and the CRC department of the university is helpful for the students.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities at the university are excellent, like unlimited Wi-Fi, good furniture, an AC dining hall, a green campus, and good infrastructure. The classroom has ACs. There is a cleanliness on the campus, and it has a ragging-free atmosphere, is under CCTV surveillance, and provides medical facilities, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication (Honours/ Research) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Great learning and experience from Amity.

content.Placements: The placements provided at Amity are good. Top media houses visited the campus for placement. The package ranges from 4-7 LPA. Many students from my batch went for higher education. Internship opportunities are provided to the students based on their interests and skills.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure provided for learning is excellent. The studio is equipped with all the necessary equipment for our learning. The classrooms have Wi-Fi. The library has books for all departments. It has computers for e-learning where students can access journals. The hostel facility is good. They provide two sharing rooms. There are 3 hostels currently. There are common rooms, game rooms, and a dance room for students' engagement. The mess area is quite big, accommodation for the students. The food provided is to suits everyone's taste. The medical staff is available for the students' help.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Well-structured curriculum and good placements.

content.Placements: In my batch out of the strength of 79 students, almost 40 percent of students got an on-campus placement with the highest offer of 19 LPA and an average of 5 LPA. 30 percent of students went for higher education. Top roles offered in our courses include Software Developer, Data Analyst, Software Engineer, etc. Recruiting companies include LearningRoutes, PlanetSpark, QSpiders, IBM, Genpact, and more.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, our college has a good infrastructure having all the required labs, with high-speed internet connections available for all the students. Our college has a wide range of books available in high-class libraries and has a vast collection of books, research papers, and digital resources. The hostel facilities are designed for our comfort and convenience, offering both AC and non-AC rooms with essential amenities like Wi-Fi, Laundry, and security.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B.(Hons.) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Insight of Amity University Raipur.

content.Placements: My batch in total has 30 students. As we are freshers, we know about our seniors who have been placed in huge companies like Amazon, Flipkart, Google, etc. The average package is 500,000 per year, and the highest goes up to 2,500,000 or something. The lowest can be 200,000 per year to start, then it can increase according to your performance in the future.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure provided by the college is top-notch. The library has vast resources, fully equipped sports facilities, and well-maintained classrooms, making it a conducive environment for learning and recreation. The campus design, with its modern amenities and green spaces, ensures a balance between study and relaxation.

admission_overview.description: Amity University Raipur admission is based on merit or entrance exam scores. The university accepts national-level entrance exams like JEE Main, CUET, etc. for admission to specific courses. Amity University Raipur offers more than 30 courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in multiple streams like Engineering, Architecture, Design, Law, Management, Commerce, Applied and Creative Arts, Vocational Education, Media, Information and Communication Technology, and Education. faqs.answer: Admissions for the Ph.D. programme are entrance-based. Amity University, Raipur conducts an entrance test. However, candidates who have cleared an All India National Level Competitive Examination like NET of UGC / CSIR / ICAR (ASRB) / GPAT / ICMR / GATE / DST - INSPIRE within the last 2 years from the time of applying for Ph.D. at Amity, shall be exempted from the written test of the Ph.D. The selection process is on the basis of the documents uploaded by them with the application form. Candidates will have to apply online mode only.
faqs.question: What is the admission process to apply for Ph.D in Amity University, Raipur?

faqs.answer: Amity University is one of the top B- schools of Raipur. Their eligibility criteria is very simple. You have to complete your undergraduate in any stream from a recognised university by UGC with at least 60% marks. Along with UG marks they are also asking for management exams such as MAT, CAT, XAT, ATMA etc. They have set the cutoff at 75 percent in CAT exam.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at Amity University Raipur?

faqs.answer: Yes, Aspirants with at least 70 percentile for CAT/ MAT are eligible for direct admission at Amity Raipur and stand exempted from the entrance exam. Only GD & PI will be conducted for eligible candidates. Besides, candidates can also take regular admission in MBA programme based on their score in CAT/ MAT/ GMAT/ GRE/ Amity Test. Shortlisted aspirants are then required to come for a personal interview round.

paragraphs: Amity Raipur admissionsstart with online application followed by selection and admission confirmation. Students are first required to register for the course of their choice. Check below theAmity Raipur admission process:

Admission confirmation:After completion of the selection rounds, the shortlisted candidates are called for verification of the documents. Aspirants need to pay theAmity University Raipur feesto confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: When will the CMAT result 2025 be released?
faqs.answer: CMAT result 2025 was declared by the National Testing Agency (NTA) on February 13, 2025. The final answer key was released on February 14, 2025 The NTA does not announce the CMAT result date beforehand but releases the scorecard within a month of the exam date. In between the CMAT exam and the result announcement, the NTA releases official answer keys and verifies objections raised by candidates.

hostel.description: Amity university provides apartment-style accommodation facility with suites of bedrooms that share a common lounge and bathroom.The rooms are well-lit and well-ventilated, with geysers in every bathroom and TV set in the common room for entertainment. The university offers free laundry service.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the campus is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is totally good for the BBA and hostel, and the facilities provided are also good. Facilities in the hostel have been improved and now they take proper care of everything. There are useless restrictions that are imposed on students that need to be stopped.

reviews.review_heading: The university has a great performance in Chhattisgarh.
reviews.review_text: The facilities at the university are excellent, like unlimited Wi-Fi, good furniture, an AC dining hall, a green campus, and good infrastructure. The classroom has ACs. There is a cleanliness on the campus, and it has a ragging-free atmosphere, is under CCTV surveillance, and provides medical facilities, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Great learning and experience from Amity.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure provided for learning is excellent. The studio is equipped with all the necessary equipment for our learning. The classrooms have Wi-Fi. The library has books for all departments. It has computers for e-learning where students can access journals. The hostel facility is good. They provide two sharing rooms. There are 3 hostels currently. There are common rooms, game rooms, and a dance room for students' engagement. The mess area is quite big, accommodation for the students. Th...

reviews.review_heading: Well-structured curriculum and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Overall, our college has a good infrastructure having all the required labs, with high-speed internet connections available for all the students. Our college has a wide range of books available in high-class libraries and has a vast collection of books, research papers, and digital resources. The hostel facilities are designed for our comfort and convenience, offering both AC and non-AC rooms with essential amenities like Wi-Fi, Laundry, and security.

reviews.review_heading: Insight of Amity University Raipur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure provided by the college is top-notch. The library has vast resources, fully equipped sports facilities, and well-maintained classrooms, making it a conducive environment for learning and recreation. The campus design, with its modern amenities and green spaces, ensures a balance between study and relaxation.

reviews.review_heading: Details of Amity University, Raipur.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is well-furnished with projectors and air-conditioned classrooms. In hostel, there are 3 rooms for 6 students sharing, one washroom and one bathroom. Mess is provided but not good in taste. The quality of food is bad. Although, it's good for making fun memories.

reviews.review_heading: Once an amitian always an amitian.
reviews.review_text: The campus infrastructure at this college is good. It has many facilities, including Wi-Fi, a library, and an auditorium. The quality and quantity of the food are also very good.

reviews.review_heading: Very pleasant campus with all the facilities available.
reviews.review_text: As being a biotechnology student, we are provided with very good lab facilities with all the necessities available! Lab hours are also scheduled in a very efficient manner! Wi-Fi is provided 24*7! Classrooms are big with a strength of 60 students! Medical facilities are also available! We have a canteen and food trucks in our campus!

reviews.review_heading: Good teaching faculty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The maintenance of classrooms and labs is very good and the canteen is hygienic. Our college is also good at sports. Wi-Fi equipment is provided on campus. The library is very big with many authors available there. The hostel facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Great facilities, and the campus is so good.
reviews.review_text: The college has great infrastructure with a good campus building, and there are washrooms and a parking area. The college offers facilities like free Wi-Fi, good classrooms, and well-equipped labs. The library is useful to students, and the hostels and mess are good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, experience during studies was good.
reviews.review_text: Transportation, air-conditioned classrooms, a mess, and a canteen were the facilities, and infrastructure was newly built. The campus was small and far from the city. The quality of the food was not good. Students got food poisoning due to the bad and unhealthy food. Sports and games competitions used to take place, like badminton and basketball, majorly.

reviews.review_heading: Nice campus and has great facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has good facilities for students. The facilities provided are separate hostels for boys and girls with free Wi-Fi, good classrooms, labs and a well-stocked library. The mess is hygienic. The infrastructure is good with proper buildings and a pleasant environment.

reviews.review_heading: A brief information about Amity University, Raipur.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and a library are available and the campus is full of AC. Everything is good, but the quality of the food is the worst. We have a canteen, but most of the time it won't have food to buy, and outside food is not allowed on campus, even if it is homely food.

reviews.review_heading: Best private college in Chhattisgarh for our BBA course.
reviews.review_text: There are beautiful classrooms on our campus, with windows and A.C. All students are allowed to access free Wi-Fi. Overall, the infrastructure of the campus is very good. The hostel also has good infrastructure, providing facilities 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: Amity university review by Seven Noel.
reviews.review_text: The syllabus is well structured and covers a good amount of all subjects and appropriate knowledge. As a hosteler, the food quality is average, the sports facilities are not that up-to-date, and the sports complex is not that developed but is improving .

Here are some additional updates regarding the Government Medical College, Nizamabad:

faqs.answer: A:    Government Medical College, Nizamabad is a well-known institution for MD, MS, MBBS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Government Medical College, Nizamabad has course specializations in Pathology, Anatomy, Toxicology, Biochemistry, ENT, Pediatrics, Anaesthesia, Microbiology, Ophthalmology, Obstetrics & Gynecology, General Medicine, Psychiatry, Physiology, Orthopaedics, Pulmonary Medicine.
faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at Government Medical College, Nizamabad?

review_content.General: The campus is absolutely fine, with greenery everywhere. Our college has well-differentiated departments and huge lecture halls, which can accommodate almost 500 to 800 people at a time. Classes were taught with the help of projectors using PPTs. Along with these curricular activities, our college excels in extracurricular activities as well, which includes conducting awareness programs, making charts and pamphlets, etc. during respective weeks, like in recently happened pharmacovigilance week, forensic week, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of infrastructure and faculty, lacks basic facilities.

review_content.Placements: This college started in 2013. Currently, there are 120 students per batch, but from 2013 to 2018, there were only 100 students per batch. I belong to the 2022 batch. There is no package for this course. Upon completing this course, you must do a one-year internship at the hospital during which you will receive a stipend of 25,000 per month. After completing the internship, you should appear for the NEET PG entrance exam to pursue your Masters.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus covers 25 acres and houses 10 departments and their respective labs, while the rest of the departments are located in the hospital. The campus has 4 lecture halls for teaching. It also has a library with all the books related to the course. Wi-Fi is not available on this campus. There are separate hostels for girls and boys, but there is poor sanitation in the hostels, and the mess is not good. The campus also lacks a canteen.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is worth it to become a good doctor.

review_content.Placements: The internship phase is very crucial as there were a lot of patients and very good exposure to many cases, which yielded many PG seats.
review_content.Infrastructure: As the college was established in 2013, labs, classrooms, a library, and hostels were built with new advancements. There is no free Wi-Fi provided. There is also an e-library which helps us solve many doubts. Hostels are well-equipped. The classes will be in the lecture halls, which are air-conditioned and spacious. The labs like anatomy are provided with cadavers, and other labs are also very well-equipped. Our college is also equipped with good sports grounds and we participate in inters.

individual_reviews.title: Pros and cons of the Government Medical College, Nizamabad.

content.Placements: Nearly 40% of our undergraduate students secure postgraduate seats in medical colleges. Packages depend on their performance in PG. Many students are recruited at Osmania Medical College. Most of them aim for a surgery background and are excelling in it.
content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi and labs with nearly 30-40 sets of equipment in each department. Our strength is 120 students per year. We have four broad classrooms with a seating capacity of nearly 300 and a small canteen. We also have basic medical facilities in our college.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is absolutely fine till now in all the aspects like discipline, studies, etc.

content.Placements: Our college offers an internship program at Government General Hospital, Nizamabad, for 1 year after completion of the course. Each and every student who passed the fourth-year final exams will get an internship program for 1 year with a monthly stipend of 25,000 to 30,000. Since our hospital has more OPs per day, the scope of gaining knowledge and practicing is high. Each and every department will be coved and posted by the interns for 1 year to know about each and every department.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is absolutely fine, with greenery everywhere. Our college has well-differentiated departments and huge lecture halls, which can accommodate almost 500 to 800 people at a time. Classes were taught with the help of projectors using PPTs. Along with these curricular activities, our college excels in extracurricular activities as well, which includes conducting awareness programs, making charts and pamphlets, etc. during respective weeks, like in recently happened pharmacovigilance week, forensic week, etc.

content.Infrastructure: The campus covers 25 acres and houses 10 departments and their respective labs, while the rest of the departments are located in the hospital. The campus has 4 lecture halls for teaching. It also has a library with all the books related to the course. Wi-Fi is not available on this campus. There are separate hostels for girls and boys, but there is poor sanitation in the hostels, and the mess is not good. The campus also lacks a canteen.

Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission.
