reviews.review_heading: Pros and cons of the Government Medical College, Nizamabad.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi and labs with nearly 30-40 sets of equipment in each department. Our strength is 120 students per year. We have four broad classrooms with a seating capacity of nearly 300 and a small canteen. We also have basic medical facilities in our college.

reviews.review_heading: The college is absolutely fine till now in all the aspects like discipline, studies, etc.
reviews.review_text: The campus is absolutely fine, with greenery everywhere. Our college has well-differentiated departments and huge lecture halls, which can accommodate almost 500 to 800 people at a time. Classes were taught with the help of projectors using PPTs. Along with these curricular activities, our college excels in extracurricular activities as well, which includes conducting awareness programs, making charts and pamphlets, etc. during respective weeks, like in recently happened pharmacovigilance week, ...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of infrastructure and faculty, lacks basic facilities.
reviews.review_text: The campus covers 25 acres and houses 10 departments and their respective labs, while the rest of the departments are located in the hospital. The campus has 4 lecture halls for teaching. It also has a library with all the books related to the course. Wi-Fi is not available on this campus. There are separate hostels for girls and boys, but there is poor sanitation in the hostels, and the mess is not good. The campus also lacks a canteen.

reviews.review_heading: It is worth it to become a good doctor.
reviews.review_text: As the college was established in 2013, labs, classrooms, a library, and hostels were built with new advancements. There is no free Wi-Fi provided. There is also an e-library which helps us solve many doubts. Hostels are well-equipped. The classes will be in the lecture halls, which are air-conditioned and spacious. The labs like anatomy are provided with cadavers, and other labs are also very well-equipped. Our college is also equipped with good sports grounds and we participate in inters.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing college life with good teachers and friends.
reviews.review_text:
Hostel is good, there is two in each room in a bigger one and one for one small room.
Each department has separate library and demo rooms and labs.
Each course year has separate lecture rooms.
There's a central library and Wi-Fi facility in every department.
Classroom has projectors.

reviews.review_heading: No one cares about your studies. You should study on your own and opt for postings regularly.
reviews.review_text: The food served here is not good. Buy cookware sets and cook are the best options. Facilities are average here. The library is average, and you can't expect high in Nizamabad. All departments are strict, and you must attend classes regularly and get doubts solved. Hostel rooms are shared by 3 students. You can get Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to join.
reviews.review_text: Everything is good in our college. Labs are also very good and every facility is available there. Hostel facility is very good and the cleaning is excellent. Every day a Sulabh worker comes and cleans. The food served is also up to the mark and you can survive easily. Medical facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel provides all the basic needs as required. Good quality of water, healthy food and a good routine of cleaning are provided. The worker comes daily for cleaning. Every facility is available near the hostel, and we enjoy it a lot. It has a very friendly environment.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college are good. It provides a large library, and also has an e-library. The classrooms have air-conditioned, and also have a badminton court, volleyball court, and basketball court. Our students also participate in various sports competitions across the state.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure, but there is no playground. Facilities provided are good. Classrooms are huge. Every department has its demo rooms. No Wi-Fi is provided. There are good labs, and teachers train you, but you have to be focused. The quality of the new hostel is good. Rooms are spacious, and a room has to be shared among 2 students. Students maintain the mess. Medical facilities are very good as you are a doctor and you have priority in treatment in the hospital. Sports and gam...

reviews.review_heading: It is absolutely good with Great faculty.
reviews.review_text: There Is a good hostel than any other college in the state because it was newly built with an equipped lift and playing grounds with well maintained new rooms daily cleaning and the library with lots of books with all subjects present and the departments in college are good in excellence.

reviews.review_heading: The happiness of my college.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in my college, including good labs, excellent classrooms, big library. Wi-Fi facilities are not available. Hostel facilities are the best. the college also offers medical facilities to the students. Students can play several games on campus.  The college also provided parking facilities for the students.

At the UG level, the college offers BA, BCom, BSc, BCA, and other courses to students. At the PG level, the college offers MSc, MCom, MA, and other courses to students. The college also provides MPhil and PhD courses to students. MSc is provided in three specialisations. Below mentioned are some of the NASC courses and their respective eligibility and NASC fee:

faqs.answer: A:    There is no specific number of students who can do a BBA at Nehru Arts and Science College. It is totally dependent on the requirements of the course and seat availability in a BBA course.10+2 passing certificate is required for entry into UG programs.Although, Admission to all courses is based on merit in the qualifying test.
faqs.question: How many students can do a BBA at Nehru Arts and Science College?

faqs.answer: A:    At NASC Coimbatore, BSc specializations in areas such as Microbiology, Computer Science, Information Technology, Forensic Science, and Catering Science & Hotel Management are available. The annual cost of the three-year NASC Coimbatore BSc programme starts at 24,000 INR and can reach up to 90,000 INR, depending on the specialization.
faqs.question: How much does BSc at Nehru Arts and Science College cost?

faqs.answer: A:    Nehru Arts and Science College admission to students in its BCom courses are made based on the merit in Class 12. In order to be eligible, a candidate must have passed Class 12 and obtained an HSC certificate is eligible to apply. The admission committee of NASC also prescribes upper age limit for admissions, which is 21 years as of July 1 of the admission year. However, the college provides relaxation on this limit in case of excellent meritorious students. NASC also offers upto five years of age relaxation for physically challenged applicants.Note: In special cases, students must confirm their eligibility status with the college before applying.
faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for BCom courses at Nehru Arts and Science College?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, students can join Nehru Arts and Science College directly without having to appear for an entrance exam. The college does not conduct any entrance exam for admission into the programs it offers. However, this could very well change your major stream and course. A small evaluation could be done. For the latest updates, visit Shiksha.com.

paragraphs: Nehru Arts and Science College Coimbatoreadmissionto courses is open. The college offers 30 courses at the UG, PG and doctoral level through six schools.The institute offers BSc, BCA BBA, BCom and BA courses at the UG level. Furthermore,Nehru Arts and Science Collegeoffers MSc, MA, MCom and MSW courses at the PG level. For UG and PG programmes, the courses are offered in multiple streams such asEngineering,Computer Applications,Management,Science, etc.

TheNehru Arts and Science College admission processbegins with the release of application forms on the official website. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria are required to apply to their desired course before the deadline.
The step-wiseNASC admission processis given below:
Step 1: NASC Application Process 2025

Candidates willing to secure admission at NASC must meet the eligibility and then apply to their desired course through theNASC official website. Aspirants must fill out the required details in the application form very carefully.
Step 2: Shortlisting of Candidates
Nehru Arts and Science College shortlists candidates based on their performance in the qualifying exam.
Step 3: Results and Admission Confirmation
After shortlisting candidates, NASC releases a merit list on its official website. Selected candidates are required to pay the admission confirmation fee to secure their seat.

faqs.question: Can students join Nehru Arts and Science College directly without any entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Yes, students can join Nehru Arts and Science College directly without having to appear for an entrance exam. The college does not conduct any entrance exam for admission into the programs it offers. However, this could very well change your major stream and course. A small evaluation could be done. For the latest updates, visit Shiksha.com.

faqs.question: Can a student get direct admissions at Nehru Arts and College?
faqs.answer: To get admissions in Nehru Arts and College Coimbatore college, a student need to process a multiple steps. To know more, candidate can check the points mnetioned below:Application Process:After verification of documents, students will be given conditional admissions. Official formalities will be completed thereafter. There will be a One to One meeting/interaction of students and parents with the Principal, HOD and dean of the college. All the necessary data/photograph/details for ID card/measurement for uniform will be measured on the day of the Interview itself (to Digital Data Bank). After the successful interview admit cards will be issued to the students.Selection Rounds:The admissions to this institute are based on merit-based for the respective course.Admission Confirmation:After completion of the selection rounds, the shortlisted candidates are called for verification of the documents. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seats in the college.

faqs.question: How many students can do a BBA at Nehru Arts and Science College?
faqs.answer: There is no specific number of students who can do a BBA at Nehru Arts and Science College. It is totally dependent on the requirements of the course and seat availability in a BBA course.10+2 passing certificate is required for entry into UG programs.Although, Admission to all courses is based on merit in the qualifying test.

placement_data.title: Nehru Arts and Science College Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: According to Nehru Arts and Science College NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during Nehru Arts and Science College UG 3-year and PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 2.52 LPA and INR 2.8 LPA , respectively. Earlier, the NIRF report 2023 was released. As per the report, 636 UG (3-year) and 117 PG (2-year) students were placed during NASC Coimbatore placements 2022. The median package offered to UG (3-year) and PG (2-year) students during placements 2022 stood at INR 2.22 LPA and INR 2.62 LPA, respectively.

faqs.question: Does Nehru Arts and Science College have good placements for BBA?
faqs.answer: Yes, in Nehru Arts and Science College, every year, 90% of students from BBA are placed in topmost companies in India with an average package of 4 LPA. All the companies come for college for placements. The students are very happy to get placements from the college with a good package. The infrastructure is very good; there are many labs in the college for each and every course, with separate labs available. Wi-Fi is only available for the faculty members. Classrooms are good and neat, the library is available, and all the books are there. The campus is very good and neat; the faculty members are very supportive and cool for our studies. The teachers are well-qualified, and the teaching method is good. The examination is conducted very strictly. The faculty members will help the students to prepare for the exam. The pass percentage of the college is good.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters for BA at Nehru Arts and Science College?
faqs.answer: Nehru Arts and Science College has not released its 2024 placements report as yet. However, the 2023 placement statistics are available. As per the report, the major recruiting companies who participated during NASC placements included Infosys, Paytm, TCS, Cognizant, ZIFO and many others.

faqs.question: How many companies participated in Nehru Arts and Science College placements 2023?
faqs.answer: The number of participating companies at Nehru Arts and Science College are: This college has almost 100% of students placed with reputable companies such as Oberoi, Le Meridian, Taj, Marriott, Wipro, Accenture, TCS, Focus, KGIS, Infosys and many more . At NASC, students are placed in prestigious firms and given competitive pay, making for an exceptional placement experience .

faqs.question: Does Nehru Arts and Science College have good placements?
faqs.answer: The placement record of Nehru Arts and Science College is good. The institution helps students become industry-ready, provides career counselling, and provide them the best possible experience by placing them in businesses of their choice. Businesses that visit the campus include Amazon, Wipro, TCS, and Capgemini. The average salary package offered was about INR 4 LPA. With over 95% of its students placed in various companies, the college has a good placement rate. During the placement process, organizations are invited, individuals are shortlisted, and recruiting drives are facilitated.

hostel_campus.college_name: Nehru Arts and Science College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: This college is very good because of its good faculty, good placements, and very good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Nehru College Coimbatore has huge library facilities, and every department has labs. Classrooms are very big with LED screens for study purposes. The hostel has Wi-Fi facilities. The hostel provides good food and quality food. They also have very good medical facilities and sports centers.

reviews.review_heading: Social interaction plays a more important role in learning and other activities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a beautiful environment and it is very neat and clean. There are a lot of sports activities and clubs in our college. Students can expose the hidden talents and sports activities for certain clubs and sports. The campus was very nice and good.

reviews.review_heading: Many companies like Wipro, Infosys, Cognizant, TCS, and Zifo visit our campus.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms are well furnished and maintained. We are providing nutritious vegetarian and non-vegetarian food is provided to the inmates. Gym, library, stores, photocopying, laundry, and free Wi-Fi connectivity are other amenities provided for the convenience of the residents.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college.
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi: Institutions usually provide Wi-Fi connectivity across the campus, including classrooms, libraries, and hostels.
Labs: Well-equipped labs with modern equipment and software are typically available for courses that require practical experiments and research.
Classrooms: Institutions usually have spacious, well-ventilated classrooms with modern teaching aids like projectors, whiteboards, and audio-visual equipment.

reviews.review_heading: You can join the college for just a degree but do not expect more than this.
reviews.review_text: Facilities for our courses include a food lab and a chemical analysis lab. Cleanliness could be improved; the food lab lacks hygiene. There are 2-3 canteens available inside the campus with average food. We have a huge library where a limited number of books are available for our courses. Classrooms are not very advanced.

reviews.review_heading: Both study and enjoyment are equal here.
reviews.review_text: The classroom facility is good and the labs are also good, but if you're looking for Wi-Fi, this campus is not a Wi-Fi-free campus; only staff can access Wi-Fi. And everyone should be required to get a library card. The library also has two floors. Finally, if you choose a hostel on a college campus, a college bus will come and pick you up and drop you off, and they will also provide food, with a rent of around 85,000 per year.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, nice staff, green campus.
reviews.review_text: Nehru Arts and Science College has well-planned, good infrastructure. Our library has different collections of books. The institution encourages sports and games through well-equipped infrastructure. The college offers hostels for boys and girls. Hostel rooms are well-furnished and maintained.

reviews.review_heading: The Campus Life was our best life and unforgettable memories.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good; there are many labs in the college for each and every course, with separate labs available. Wi-Fi is only available for the faculty members. Classrooms are good and neat, the library is available, and all the books are there. The campus is very good and neat; the faculty members are very supportive and cool.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled but the network facility is not good. Mobile phones are not allowed on our campus. Dress code is mandatory in this college. Our campus maintains discipline strictly. The food served in the canteen is good at affordable prices.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nehru Arts and Science College.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent infrastructure. The library has more than 2,000 books. Our college is well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has friendly teachers.
reviews.review_text: The food served in the hostel is good and hygienic. Students are safe in the hostel. The hostel rooms are well-maintained and clean. The warden is good. We have a bus facility. The infrastructure of our college is good. We have a canteen. It provides food at affordable prices.

reviews.review_heading: Nehru Arts and Science college is great.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well maintained. They have digital white boards, and projectors In every classroom. Hostel is well maintained, with 24*7 Wi-Fi, daily cleaning, and laundry services. Sports and games are entertained by the teachers, and trained professionals are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Nehru have good infrastructure and a peaceful surrounding.
reviews.review_text: College have good infrastructure and surrounding. Other facilities like canteen, hostel etc. Are available. Our hostel facilities is very nice, maintenance and food are very good and are well maintained in our hostel and college. The classrooms have projector facilities also.

reviews.review_heading: Nehru arts thirumalayampalayam.
reviews.review_text:
With better security and food facility well maintained hostel area. Staffs are well managed with meetings everyday 
classrooms are good and clean daily. Library with lots of books and references. Bus facility also available. Secured campus without any noise. Eco friendly area.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its good teachers, facilities, and placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities and infrastructure. Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, medical facilities, sports, a library, etc. The hostel facilities are good. All labs are very neat. They have more than 20 systems. All classroom facilities are good. The infrastructure of classrooms is good.

review_summary.college_name: East West College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure and maintenance.

content.Placements: Our college provides various opportunities for industrial work. Companies like Cipla, Apollo, and Medplus visit our college. Students got good placements in the bachelor's degree. Students should perform well and have good skills. Our college provides internships and placements in different companies.
content.Infrastructure: It is a surrounding area where all the colleges of East West Institution are located. The boys' hotel is present inside the college campus. It is safe for our college and hostel students. The building is good, clean, and maintains the environmental conditions.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: My life at this college.

content.Placements: In my course, about 120 students were placed. The highest package went to foreign students, like Nigerians, and the average package was for regular students, who paid about 1 lakh per year. The lowest package was for government seats, which paid about INR 75,000 per year. Some students got into Apollo as beginners, some got recruited as medical representatives in companies like Lupin and Cipla, and others opted for masters.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel was bearable except for the food. The labs and libraries had what we needed, but the washrooms were not properly sanitized. WiFi was not available, but it wasn't necessary because the teachers provided notes.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D. - Post Baccalaureate) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: In our college, almost 30% of students are studying this course. Top recruiting companies like Apollo, Reliance, etc., visit our campus. Around 15 to 20 students get internships. The top role offered is drug inspector.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities. The library is fine. The hostel facilities are adequate. The quality of the food is acceptable. The hostel rooms are clean. Sports are held every year.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are helpful, qualified, and well-experienced. The course doesn't make students industry-ready, but it makes them hospital-ready. The pass percentage is 50%.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I would rate it 4 out of 5 based on infrastructure and faculty members.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 1.5 LPA. Many top companies visit our college to hire students. Internships are also offered in our course. The top role is offered in clinical pharmacy.
content.Infrastructure: It provides a huge library. Sports and games are conducted. Classrooms are also very good.
content.Faculty: Teachers and HOD are very helpful in every department. They are very knowledgeable and their teaching quality is good. They always clear our doubts, and we also understand them very well. The course curriculum is relevant to make students ready for the industry. Semester exams are average, and the pass percentage is 50%.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I would rate it 4 out of 5 based on academics and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 1.5 lacks per month. The lowest salary offered was Rs.50,000 per month. Students pass easily as a doctorate in hospital and clinical pharmacy.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. Classrooms are good. It also provides a huge library. The food served in the hostel is very good. Hostel rooms are better.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful and highly knowledgeable. HOD is also helpful in academics. During exams also they are helpful. Their teaching quality is good. They always help us to clear our doubts. The course curriculum is relevant to make students ready for the industry. Semester exams are easy. The pass percentage is 50%.

overview_faqs.question: Is Ramniranjan Jhunjhunwala College of Arts, Science and Commerce a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Ramniranjan Jhunjhunwala College of Arts, Science and Commerce is a well-known institution for PG Diploma, B.A, M.A, B.Voc, B.Com, B.M.M, B.Sc, BBM/BMS courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Ramniranjan Jhunjhunwala College of Arts, Science and Commerce has a rating of 4.07 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.84 on Campus Life, 3.76 on Placements, 4.45 on Faculty and 4.14 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Jhunjhunwala College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is the best autonomous college for computer Science degree.

content.Placements: I have not any experience in the placements because I am pursuing the course but there is many placements available in this college as I heard by the seniors. I am currently in third year from june 2026 and the amount of the packages are around 15-30 thousand.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is so good because it is pure example of less space can create the good campus, it is not the very large campus but it is perfect campus according to their space and the best part is the college is just beside of the railway station which is very good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors in Mass Media - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Disappointing experience at Ramniranjan Jhunjhunwala College due to poor management and faculty.

content.Placements: Approximately 65% of students from the BAMMC course secured placements through college drives or independent applications, with around 80% receiving internship opportunities during their studies. Package details include a highest of 6.5 LPA, an average of 3.2 LPA, and a lowest of 1.8 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Times Network, Reliance Entertainment, Ogilvy & Mather, The Viral Fever (TVF), and ABP News.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is below average. Classrooms lack proper ventilation and teaching facilities. Wi-Fi is weak, labs are outdated, and library resources are limited. The hostel is congested, mess food is poor in quality, and medical/sports facilities are adequate.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Management Studies (B.M.S) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Best faculty members helps you in studies.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placements. The companies are like Wipro and Accenture. The roles are for finance, HR, and marketing departments. Most of the teachers help you to find and make a good employee to work with. Also in finding jobs, the faculty members have more experience in the college.
content.Infrastructure: Clean classroom and Wi-Fi connection are provided. We have nice and clean environment. Labs are also provided for practical. There is a regular cleaning process going on all through the college. Even food is hygienic and medical facilities are provided in case of need.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Management Studies (B.M.S) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a great college with maximum exposure towards improving yourself.

content.Placements: There were various drives conducted in our college, including Eclerx, TCS, and many more. Teachers were very supportive during this process. There were still groups of campus placements that provided great opportunities for students to learn and grow.
content.Infrastructure: All the basic facilities were provided in the college, and there were some air-conditioned classrooms too. There was a beautiful seminar room and a huge hall for functions. Students were also permitted to conduct events and other activities in the respective places.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College is good for students for studies.

content.Placements: 40% to 70% of students got placed I don't know about the packages. Top roles offered in this course are research associate, biotech consultant, and many more biotech-related jobs. Internships are also provided to students who are exceptionally well in their studies and lab.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are well-equipped and new instruments are available. Wi-Fi, condition of labs, and classrooms are good. Canteen serves good food. College campus have medical facilities and the sports day is conducted for every sports. Every day a new completing sports are played.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best autonomous college for computer Science degree.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is so good because it is pure example of less space can create the good campus, it is not the very large campus but it is perfect campus according to their space and the best part is the college is just beside of the railway station which is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Disappointing experience at Ramniranjan Jhunjhunwala College due to poor management and faculty.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is below average. Classrooms lack proper ventilation and teaching facilities. Wi-Fi is weak, labs are outdated, and library resources are limited. The hostel is congested, mess food is poor in quality, and medical/sports facilities are adequate.

reviews.review_heading: Best faculty members helps you in studies.
reviews.review_text: Clean classroom and Wi-Fi connection are provided. We have nice and clean environment. Labs are also provided for practical. There is a regular cleaning process going on all through the college. Even food is hygienic and medical facilities are provided in case of need.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college with maximum exposure towards improving yourself.
reviews.review_text: All the basic facilities were provided in the college, and there were some air-conditioned classrooms too. There was a beautiful seminar room and a huge hall for functions. Students were also permitted to conduct events and other activities in the respective places.

reviews.review_heading: College is good for students for studies.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well-equipped and new instruments are available. Wi-Fi, condition of labs, and classrooms are good. Canteen serves good food. College campus have medical facilities and the sports day is conducted for every sports. Every day a new completing sports are played.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with my college journey.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. It has everything that we need for studying and entertainment. Facilities are also good from medical to clean restrooms, from sports to games, etc. Food in canteen is good too clean and hygienic so nothing to worry about.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing faculty members in biotechnology department, bad crowd, no campus.
reviews.review_text: Facilities include a departmental library, an e-library, fully air-conditioned classrooms, Wi-Fi, and labs with essential equipment like incubators, centrifuge machines, and autoclaves. There is also a bioinformatics lab. Hostel facilities are not available, but paying guest accommodations are located near Ghatkopar station. The canteen food quality is below average. Medical facilities are average, but sports and games are heavily promoted.

reviews.review_heading: One of the better colleges.
reviews.review_text: Our department provides us with better education, which is relevant to real-life career-oriented skills. They have their own library, classroom, and laboratory as well. Our college doesn't provide any kind of hostel facility to students, so I can't comment on that. I have not tasted the food quality of the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college, and every student should consider taking admission for any course here.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility were not available during my time, but there was emergency Wi-Fi, which we use to get 34 MB per day by signing in through a mobile number. You can use different numbers to get more data. Although, the college infrastructure is good. It is located opposite to station, there is a little bit of noise. Overall, everything else is good.

reviews.review_heading: A new world in our short life.
reviews.review_text: There is a good gymkhana that provides indoor game facilities. They also offer grounds for football, tennis, volleyball, and other sports. classrooms are spacious, and benches are in excellent condition. Surrounding areas are also well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: A good campus life where you have a lot of fun and experience and learning.
reviews.review_text: As I am an IT student, I am under the IT department. There are many departments, like the physics department and the CS department, etc. They all work very nicely. The labs are well-equipped with all the necessary things required, and the rooms are air-conditioned. The classrooms are clean, and proper hygiene is maintained. The library is very big and has a lot of books, around 10,000.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ramniranjan Jhunjhunwala College of Arts, Science and Commerce.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at Ramniranjan Jhunjhunwala College is good. The classrooms and labs are in good condition, and the college provides facilities for games and sports. However, the college does not provide hostel facilities. The only thing we like about the canteen at RJ College is the tea.

reviews.review_heading: Although dissatisfied about placement, campus, and canteen, but faculty & library is great.
reviews.review_text: Library is great, but the college infrastructure is very worse—old benches, broken walls, etc. Canteen is like ***—no hygiene, nothing. Canteen sells Frankie, and that guy cleans his hand on the cleaning towel after preparing each order. The prices are too high compared to the college atmosphere.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the course and curriculum but infrastructure is really bad
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good for the BMS course, and good labs are also provided with internet. The quality of the canteen is not good. For sports and games, there are many options in Jhunjhunwala College. This college also provides placements to people who are disabled through job fairs, especially for them.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good, but dissatisfied because of campus. Placements are also good.
reviews.review_text: Yes, Wi-Fi is available, and the infrastructure is also good. Some classrooms are air-conditioned, but some are not. The library is better than at other colleges; it even got 3rd place in Mumbai for libraries. However, there is no hostel. The canteen offers quality food, and medical facilities are available. We have 2 slits (assuming this is referring to something specific) and one small ground, which is enough for our students.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Ramniranjan Jhunjhunwala College of Arts, Science and Commerce

likes.text: Companies like Godrej, Infosys, LTI, ICICI, and TCS visit the college for recruiting.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University fee structure ranges between INR 20,000 to 13,05,400.

reviews_list.review_title: This is the best university in the state of Punjab.

review_content.Placements: This university was the best place for upgrading skills practically as well as theoretically. Most students scored a CGPA above 8. The maximum salary package was approximately 8–10 LPA. Most of students attended internships in different as well as best companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Many facilities were there, such as delicious food with a great seating area, Wi-Fi, electricity, a library with a quiet environment, medical facilities with professional staff, clean surroundings, clean restrooms, sports facilities, and a screen time area also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University.

review_content.Placements: About 40-50% of the students from our course got placed. The highest salary package offered is 20 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies like HDFC Bank, DCB Bank, ICICI Bank HCL, TCS, etc., visit our campus for placements. Top roles, like marketing, sales executive, manager and assistant manager, are offered to the students. About 40% of the students got a chance for internships in private banks as a marketing executive.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is very pleasant. You will be totally safe here, and it gives you a positive vibe to study harder. Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs and classrooms are good. Students get a lot of new opportunities every day to develop their skills through extracurricular activities.

faqs.answer: Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University provides very liberal entry, because the majority of its programme follows merit basis and hence it admits students after clearing eligibility conditions for most of the programs; that are undergraduate or postgraduate course. And that candidate requires minimum of 50% aggregate in any previously done qualifying examination, however the entire process to make an application is so straightforward; for which he submits the prescribed online application form. He just needs to make payment as a cost toward form that amounts ?600. Whereas certain colleges require entrance exam scores like CAT/MAT for the MBA, the majority of the seats are simply merit-based, making the entire affair a relatively straightforward affair to get admission, in contrast to more strenuous colleges.
faqs.question: Q: Is it easy to get admission in Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University?

faqs.answer: Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University (SGGSWU) accepts all entrance exams to enter the institution for MBA. The main entrance exams accepted are CAT, MAT, CMAT, and XAT. Candidates who have passed any of these entrance exams have priority during the admission procedure. Apart from this, SGGSWU might also consider scores from the entrance tests conducted at state levels. The candidate must score at least 50 percent marks in graduation to become eligible for admission. Entrance Exam: The selection process also includes performance in group discussions and personal interviews after entrance exam scores.
faqs.question: Q: What entrance exams are accepted by Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University for admission to MBA?

review_summary.college_name: Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Teachers don't teach. No datesheet provided on time. Only projects files were given to complete.

content.Placements: I think I do not know anyone who got a good package at this university. I took admission here because one of my friends told me that this university is so good and a good placement was got by a lot of people, but that all was false. He also said that we can get placement in Microsoft also.
content.Infrastructure: Our university environment is good. It features a big ground with a lot of greenery and trees everywhere. University's size is quite large, and it even has a temple inside. Computer labs are available, and canteens are also present, where many students gather with their partners.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Chemistry - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: This is the best university in the state of Punjab.

content.Placements: This university was the best place for upgrading skills practically as well as theoretically. Most students scored a CGPA above 8. The maximum salary package was approximately 8–10 LPA. Most of students attended internships in different as well as best companies.
content.Infrastructure: Many facilities were there, such as delicious food with a great seating area, Wi-Fi, electricity, a library with a quiet environment, medical facilities with professional staff, clean surroundings, clean restrooms, sports facilities, and a screen time area also available.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University.

content.Placements: About 40-50% of the students from our course got placed. The highest salary package offered is 20 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies like HDFC Bank, DCB Bank, ICICI Bank HCL, TCS, etc., visit our campus for placements. Top roles, like marketing, sales executive, manager and assistant manager, are offered to the students. About 40% of the students got a chance for internships in private banks as a marketing executive.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is very pleasant. You will be totally safe here, and it gives you a positive vibe to study harder. Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs and classrooms are good. Students get a lot of new opportunities every day to develop their skills through extracurricular activities.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: A college where you can do anything what you want with no restriction.

content.Placements: In my course we have 45 students in the class all the students are very good in coding except some students who does not take class seriously. The average salary is 25000 for month and it will increase as you doing your work well. The recruiting companies are Plasma, hdfc bank and other software development companies. In my university some people are given job by the plasma and other IT companies.
content.Infrastructure: The university campus is very good and all the teachers are very friendly they always take care of their poor students. Wi-Fi is almost free for every student. Students can check what they want to see in the internet either they have no internet connection. The hostel is very neat and clean.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: The college is average in all the aspects.

content.Placements: No placements as were conducted by the university, because we are the first outgoing batch. So there was no placement cell. This university is more towards religious activities not towards study. There is lack of exposure for the students but before taking admission go and check out the place by yourself.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides well-furnished infrastructure. They have invested so much of money towards infrastructure about 400cr. The studies of the college are inadequate. The hostel is excellent like 5-star hotels; you must visit the hostel.

admission_process.title: Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University admissions are entrance-based. The institute accepts scores in CAT, MAT, and CMAT, etc.Sri Guru Granth Sahib World Universityoffers courses at UG level in Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design, Law, Humanities and Social Sciences, Hospitality and Travel, Science and Teaching and Education stream. The institute offers B.A. B.Ed for 4 years in various specialisations. Candidates can fill out the application form online for admission.

The total tuition fees for UG course isINR 30,000 - 13,05,400. Aspirants have to pay the programme fees at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the institute. The total fees may also include other components such as caution deposit, hostel fees, etc.

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission in Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University?
faqs.answer: Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University provides very liberal entry, because the majority of its programme follows merit basis and hence it admits students after clearing eligibility conditions for most of the programs; that are undergraduate or postgraduate course. And that candidate requires minimum of 50% aggregate in any previously done qualifying examination, however the entire process to make an application is so straightforward; for which he submits the prescribed online application form. He just needs to make payment as a cost toward form that amounts ?600. Whereas certain colleges require entrance exam scores like CAT/MAT for the MBA, the majority of the seats are simply merit-based, making the entire affair a relatively straightforward affair to get admission, in contrast to more strenuous colleges.

faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted by Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University for admission to MBA?
faqs.answer: Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University (SGGSWU) accepts all entrance exams to enter the institution for MBA. The main entrance exams accepted are CAT, MAT, CMAT, and XAT. Candidates who have passed any of these entrance exams have priority during the admission procedure. Apart from this, SGGSWU might also consider scores from the entrance tests conducted at state levels. The candidate must score at least 50 percent marks in graduation to become eligible for admission. Entrance Exam: The selection process also includes performance in group discussions and personal interviews after entrance exam scores.

placement_data.title: SGGSWU Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The University has not released the placement report or brochure for 2023. However, the NIRF report 2023 is out. As per the report, 4 UG (4-year) and 27 PG (2-year) students were placed in 2022. Further, the median package offered to UG (4-year) and PG (2-year) students during Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University placements 2022 was the same and the amount stood at INR 2.50 LPA . Firefox, Nestle, and Coca-Cola were some of the leading companies that were part of SGGSWU placements in recent years.

hostel_campus.college_name: Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Teachers don't teach. No datesheet provided on time. Only projects files were given to complete.
reviews.review_text: Our university environment is good. It features a big ground with a lot of greenery and trees everywhere. University's size is quite large, and it even has a temple inside. Computer labs are available, and canteens are also present, where many students gather with their partners.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best university in the state of Punjab.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities were there, such as delicious food with a great seating area, Wi-Fi, electricity, a library with a quiet environment, medical facilities with professional staff, clean surroundings, clean restrooms, sports facilities, and a screen time area also available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very pleasant. You will be totally safe here, and it gives you a positive vibe to study harder. Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs and classrooms are good. Students get a lot of new opportunities every day to develop their skills through extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: A college where you can do anything what you want with no restriction.
reviews.review_text: The university campus is very good and all the teachers are very friendly they always take care of their poor students. Wi-Fi is almost free for every student. Students can check what they want to see in the internet either they have no internet connection. The hostel is very neat and clean.

reviews.review_heading: The college is average in all the aspects.
reviews.review_text: The college provides well-furnished infrastructure. They have invested so much of money towards infrastructure about 400cr. The studies of the college are inadequate. The hostel is excellent like 5-star hotels; you must visit the hostel.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Absolute satisfied with the facilities and really good infrastructure and atmosphere!

review_content.Placements: The students, after completing the course of three professional years, have to do an internship at the college hospital for the next year. The students get a handsome amount of stipend, which is 23.5K per month. After that, they are eligible for PG or can practice
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides a vast infrastructure, including labs, classrooms, a library, a hostel, a playground, and a botanical garden as well. Many curricular activities are performed, such as games and sports, free medical facilities for students, and many more. It is a nice place to be.

reviews_list.batch_info: MD in Ayurveda - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with college administration and staff.

review_content.Placements: The placement is not offered by the college as it it's a government college. 100% passing students got internship in government Ayurved hospitals and stipend paid is around 12000/month. There are no placement cell.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no dissection hall and no dissection facilities. The building is very old and big. There is a library but no digital classrooms. No Wi-Fi is available here. Badminton court is there but its too old and wrecked. Volleyball ground and table tennis court is also there.
review_content.Faculty: The professors and teaching staff are so knowledgeable and excellent in teaching. One problem is that the teaching staff does not carry regular lectures and went on holidays for weeks to months. The syllabus is not also completed frequently. The staff disagress to solve doubts and questions.

overview_faqs.question: Is Institute of Post Graduate Teaching and Research in Ayurveda, Gujarat Ayurveda University a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Institute of Post Graduate Teaching and Research in Ayurveda, Gujarat Ayurveda University is a reputed institute for Ph.D., M.Pharma, B.A.M.S., MD. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Medicine & Health Sciences. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Institute of Post Graduate Teaching and Research in Ayurveda, Gujarat Ayurveda University has a review rating of 2 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 1 on campuslife, 2 on placements, 1 on faculty and 1 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Institute of Post Graduate Teaching and Research in Ayurveda Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is really good, and hostels are undergoing construction

content.Placements: It is a medical college, so one year of internship is mandatory, where we get the salary or pay. In the last year, after completing 4.5 years of study, one undergoes an internship at the college hospital, and there is a decent amount of patient flow. After that, you are dependent on your own for your job.
content.Infrastructure: Every facility is provided, including a hostel, canteen, medical facilities, and a guest room for foreigners. Sports area is fully developed. Labs are fully equipped, and teachers are very supportive there. There is also a dissection hall containing a cadaver and many preserved organs.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolute satisfied with the facilities and really good infrastructure and atmosphere!

content.Placements: The students, after completing the course of three professional years, have to do an internship at the college hospital for the next year. The students get a handsome amount of stipend, which is 23.5K per month. After that, they are eligible for PG or can practice
content.Infrastructure: The college provides a vast infrastructure, including labs, classrooms, a library, a hostel, a playground, and a botanical garden as well. Many curricular activities are performed, such as games and sports, free medical facilities for students, and many more. It is a nice place to be.

individual_reviews.course: MD in Ayurveda - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with college administration and staff.

content.Placements: The placement is not offered by the college as it it's a government college. 100% passing students got internship in government Ayurved hospitals and stipend paid is around 12000/month. There are no placement cell.
content.Infrastructure: There is no dissection hall and no dissection facilities. The building is very old and big. There is a library but no digital classrooms. No Wi-Fi is available here. Badminton court is there but its too old and wrecked. Volleyball ground and table tennis court is also there.
content.Faculty: The professors and teaching staff are so knowledgeable and excellent in teaching. One problem is that the teaching staff does not carry regular lectures and went on holidays for weeks to months. The syllabus is not also completed frequently. The staff disagress to solve doubts and questions.

overview_faqs.answer: MES Medical College is a renowned institution offering PG Diploma, MD, MS, DM, MBBS. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Medicine & Health Sciences. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. MES Medical College boasts an impressive review rating of 3.8 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 3.75 for Campus Life, 3.5 for Placements, 4 for Faculty, and 4 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: MES Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Nice college with academics but only a few cultural programs.

content.Placements: In our course, everyone who passes gets the opportunity to do an internship at the same college hospital, which I’m sure is the case in every medical college. After the internship, students can either opt for doing postgraduation or can practice as general practitioners in hospitals. Placements are not actually provided by the college but are sought and chosen by the students themselves.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities available in the college include the hostel, gym, library for maximum reference, mess facilities, canteen facilities, and areas for sports like football, cricket, volleyball, badminton, basketball, throwball, etc. The food from the hostel is quite okay, but it is not very tasty. It is just satisfactory.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good teaching and facilities but not the expected colors of college life.

content.Placements: Actually, there are no placements here. Most students work here as medical officers (MOs) after completing the course, and our college provides a good salary. Some others prepare for NEET PG, while a small group enters other hospitals or goes abroad for further studies or jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has classrooms with smart class facilities, different labs, a dissection hall, Wi-Fi, demonstration and seminar rooms, etc. It also has a library with many medical books and a study hall. Hostel facilities are good compared to other colleges, with 4 or 3 people in one room, a mess hall, and a TV. The food is not bad, with non-veg daily. There are two football grounds, two basketball courts, a tennis court, etc.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and patients. Campus spacious. Experienced faculty members.

content.Placements: Very high placements. About 5 LPA expected starting salary. Students can enter RMO jobs as soon as they graduate. The unemployment rate is low compared to other jobs. If you decide to go for post-graduation, your value as a professional increases multiple-fold.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hospital is good. Nice college. Spacious campus. Good enough facilities for recreational activities (sports and games). Hostel facilities could be better. The quality of food could be better. Hostel bathrooms are not clean. That could be better.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the facilities and infrastructure available at my college.

content.Placements: I am studying at MS medical college. There are hundred and fifty students in my class. Hundred percentage placement is assured. The highest package is for NRI quota and is of about twenty Lacs per year. The lowest package is for special reservation like SC, ST, and is free of cost.
content.Infrastructure: We have a well-equipped classroom with well-maintained centralized air conditioning. Good and calm atmospheric library with all days availability. Hostel facilities are also good with good quality variety foods. 24-hour medical facility is available.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A good medical college, excellent faculty members, and academic quality.

content.Placements: Our batch consists of one hundred and fifty students. Later, after passing the first year, it reduced to one hundred and thirty-seven. The highest package for NRI students is 20 Lacs per year for 5 years, and the merit package consists of approximately 6.5 Lacs for our batch.
content.Infrastructure: Hospital infrastructure is developing day by day with centralized AC facilities in all lecture halls and clinical classrooms, with Wi-Fi facilities available in the hospital. We also have a well-ventilated library with an enormous number of good quality, up-to-date books, which even include postgraduate coaching books.

description: MES Malappuram cutoff 2024 for NEET SS is available on this page for admission to super speciality courses. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for different categories of students belonging to the AI quota. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the MES Malappuram NEET SS cutoff 2024 for different courses, specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:

MES Malappuram NEET SS Cutoff 2024 was released for the concluding round in the form of ranks for admission to DM course across multiple specialisations. The cutoff was released for various categories belonging to the AI quota.
In the first round, MES Malappuram DM cutoff 2024 was 3086 for students in the General AI category. DM in Neurology was the toughest to get into.

In this section, candidates can find out the category-wise NEET SS cutoff 2024 and 2023. In 2024, for the General AI quota, the NEET SS cutoff was closed at 5865 for DM in Neurology. In 2023, the same specialisation cutoff was capped at 4620.

reviews.review_text: My college gives me good infrastructure with well-educated, highly qualified faculty members with all-time availability. It also has a well-equipped, centralized air-conditioned classroom, 24-hour availability of a library, and well-developed and well-equipped laboratories.

reviews.review_heading: Academically one of the top 10 in India.
reviews.review_text: There are air-conditioned lecture halls available for each batch separately, a central library with most standard textbooks, Wi-Fi, and all medical laboratory settings. Hostel facilities are available separately for boys and girls, along with mess facilities, and a canteen is also present.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best in academic matters.
reviews.review_text: There is no free wifi, but labs, classroom facilities, and library facilities are good. We have almost all international textbooks, and it is open 18 hours a day. We have 4 members in each room and there is 24-hour electricity and good ventilation in room

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college as I am able to utilize every inch of this profession.
reviews.review_text:
There are well-equipped infrastructures.
There are comfortable classrooms with centralized air conditioners. A well-arranged library with 24-hour access. Hostel facilities are not really good; they are congested rooms. Tasty and healthy hygienic food and 24-hour medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Detailed review about MES Medical College.
reviews.review_text:
Our college has good infrastructure, a new basketball court, well-maintained turf for football, badminton court, volleyball court, and an additional ground for cricket. Sports is well promoted here at MES.
We are also provided with a gym facility with separate timings for men and women.
There is a well-maintained library with a study hall present too.
There is no college-provided WiFi.
Classrooms are extremely large and can accommodate all the students in a batch adequately . It is equipped with...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college and would recommend it to others for good academics.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available in the college, but it is accessible in the hospital and its vicinity. There is a large library available for all students. The infrastructure of the college is very old and small; it does not have a big campus. The hostel is quite poor, with four people in a room and very congested, but the food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Highly satisfied with the medical services and the education quality.
reviews.review_text: The hostel infrastructure is very poor, and Wi-Fi is not available in the hospital or the library. However, the food is better than at other hostels, and the medical facilities are excellent. The lecture halls have very good infrastructure, and the sports and games facilities are average.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the infrastructure, faculty members and the course in general.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers Wi-Fi service all around the campus. The classes have digital screens and AC services in the classrooms. We have a library that could accommodate a maximum of 150 students. Each department has their own concerned demo rooms and labs. The infrastructure is excellent.

reviews.review_heading: The college is okay with average infrastructure and good teaching facilities, good mess facilities.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is congested, but the food is fine. The toilets are common, and there is a curfew at 8:45 p.m. There is a common mess that is within walking distance, and a canteen that serves affordable and hygienic food. There is a turf on campus where students can play sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Good academics but average facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has well-equipped lecture halls, demonstration rooms, labs, and museums with air conditioning, adequate lighting, and ventilation. The hospital has Wi-Fi, but it is not available on the campus. The library and reading room are in the same building. The hostel facilities are average, but the mess and canteen have good food. Students have free consultation and 50% concession for hospital facilities. The college encourages sports and has two football grounds, basketball courts, badminto...

highlights.summary:
The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for JMF s A.C.P.M. Dental College admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good learning experience with a healthy environment and great experience learning.

review_content.Placements: Around 100 students are admitted as per the allotted seats in every batch. There are no placements as such, but our college gives us several opportunities to build good careers through several workshops and seminars which are innovative and enhance our vision towards the path.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a good and spacious accommodation facility in the hostel with furnished rooms and all other supplies. No issues are encountered with electricity and water supply, quick res solvation of issues if any. Classrooms and working laboratories are there. The area is well-equipped and spacious with accommodation for around more than 200 students at a time. Well-digitalised classrooms with smart boards enhance one's learning experience.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with its faculty members and their teaching.

review_content.Placements: After this course, most students can easily get placements in good medical colleges. The highest salary offered in the initial days is Rs. 50,000 per month to Rs. 60,000 per month, and the highest can go up to Rs. 120000 per month. Top medical hospitals recruit students. Most students get internships after completing this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are very good and well equipped with advanced features like Wi-Fi. Cassrooms have digital boards and projectors to make things complex. The canteen food is good and tasty, with a lot of varieties. The canteen is quite hygienic in terms of food.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: ACPM is the best college in Maharashtra.

review_content.Placements: There are 100% placements in our college. Our college is best for internships also. The patient flow is also very nice, and there is a lot of practice for dental students. Every student can get a lot of patients for practice, and practical based knowledge is provided here. It is the best college in Maharashtra.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is very nice here, and all the facilities are available here. The mess is also very nice, and varieties of dishes are served in the mess. There is a facility for filtered drinking water, and all Covid-19 precautions are followed here. You will have to do hand wash and sanitise your hands before eating food.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college with high exposure and good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: ACPM colleges do not provide placements. But there is a compulsory internship that is to be undertaken by each student after the 4th year. The amount of exposure is infinite because students get a chance to practice on many patients as the college also has a hospital on the campus. So, once the students are trained in a professional manner, they start handling patients on a daily basis, which is very important.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility was available for both girls and boys for approximately 300 students individually. They were a recently constructed gym and other facilities on the campus. The library of college was huge, with a capacity of occupying more than 800 students at any time. Mess and canteen are good as well.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am fully satisfied with the faculty members.

review_content.Placements: The college does not provide placements. After graduation, one can opt for private practice or any hospital. Students can also do post-graduation and then can go for a private clinic or other hospital jobs. Acrylan and Colgate are the top recruiting companies for our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is fully equipped with Wi-Fi and classrooms. Laboratories are centralised air-conditioned. Quality of food served in the mess is good. Students play many sports here. The college provides many games like volleyball, football, cricket, badminton, table tennis, kabaddi and hockey. Facilities like gymnasium and swimming pool are also available.

review_summary.college_name: JMF’s A.C.P.M. Dental College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good learning experience with a healthy environment and great experience learning.

content.Placements: Around 100 students are admitted as per the allotted seats in every batch. There are no placements as such, but our college gives us several opportunities to build good careers through several workshops and seminars which are innovative and enhance our vision towards the path.
content.Infrastructure: There is a good and spacious accommodation facility in the hostel with furnished rooms and all other supplies. No issues are encountered with electricity and water supply, quick res solvation of issues if any. Classrooms and working laboratories are there. The area is well-equipped and spacious with accommodation for around more than 200 students at a time. Well-digitalised classrooms with smart boards enhance one's learning experience.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with its faculty members and their teaching.

content.Placements: After this course, most students can easily get placements in good medical colleges. The highest salary offered in the initial days is Rs. 50,000 per month to Rs. 60,000 per month, and the highest can go up to Rs. 120000 per month. Top medical hospitals recruit students. Most students get internships after completing this course.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are very good and well equipped with advanced features like Wi-Fi. Cassrooms have digital boards and projectors to make things complex. The canteen food is good and tasty, with a lot of varieties. The canteen is quite hygienic in terms of food.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: ACPM is the best college in Maharashtra.

content.Placements: There are 100% placements in our college. Our college is best for internships also. The patient flow is also very nice, and there is a lot of practice for dental students. Every student can get a lot of patients for practice, and practical based knowledge is provided here. It is the best college in Maharashtra.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is very nice here, and all the facilities are available here. The mess is also very nice, and varieties of dishes are served in the mess. There is a facility for filtered drinking water, and all Covid-19 precautions are followed here. You will have to do hand wash and sanitise your hands before eating food.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with high exposure and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: ACPM colleges do not provide placements. But there is a compulsory internship that is to be undertaken by each student after the 4th year. The amount of exposure is infinite because students get a chance to practice on many patients as the college also has a hospital on the campus. So, once the students are trained in a professional manner, they start handling patients on a daily basis, which is very important.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility was available for both girls and boys for approximately 300 students individually. They were a recently constructed gym and other facilities on the campus. The library of college was huge, with a capacity of occupying more than 800 students at any time. Mess and canteen are good as well.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am fully satisfied with the faculty members.

content.Placements: The college does not provide placements. After graduation, one can opt for private practice or any hospital. Students can also do post-graduation and then can go for a private clinic or other hospital jobs. Acrylan and Colgate are the top recruiting companies for our course.
content.Infrastructure: The college is fully equipped with Wi-Fi and classrooms. Laboratories are centralised air-conditioned. Quality of food served in the mess is good. Students play many sports here. The college provides many games like volleyball, football, cricket, badminton, table tennis, kabaddi and hockey. Facilities like gymnasium and swimming pool are also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: In this college, placements should be more, and the infrastructure is good.

review_content.Placements: Around half of the students in each batch are placed. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA for fresher. The lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Parexel and Accenture are the top recruiting companies in this course. The top roles offered are clinical data associate and clinical pharmacist. Placements should be improved more in this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: In this college, laboratories and libraries are well-equipped. The quality of food served in the hostel is well-maintained. Sports are encouraged. But everything should be improved more for students. Other facilities other than food are good in the hostel. The hostel environment is good and friendly.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: This is the college of contract based education.

review_content.Placements: In this college, no companies will conduct the drive. The students on the campus are expecting more but the college faculty members are being failed to provide those facilities.
review_content.Infrastructure: The building of this college is very old, and the facilities are also not good. The Wi-Fi is not available, and there is a library, undeveloped laboratories are also provided, and a low number of classes are there. The college does not have a hostel and canteen. The sports facility is sufficient for the strength of the class.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are prominent. Some are masters completed and some are having their PhDs. In this college, they do not provide any workshops and also won't take students on any industrial tours, when students come out of college they have to go for training classes to acquire knowledge of the industry.

reviews_list.batch_info: M. Pharma in Pharmaceutical Chemistry - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied because of faculty members, good placements, and better infrastructure.
