overview_faqs.question: Is JNTUA-Oil Technological & Pharmaceutical Research Institute a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: JNTUA-Oil Technological & Pharmaceutical Research Institute is a well-known institution for PG Diploma, M.Sc., M.Pharma, Pharm.D, B.Pharma courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, JNTUA-Oil Technological & Pharmaceutical Research Institute has a rating of 2.8 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.5 on campuslife, 2.4 on placements, 3 on faculty and 2.3 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: JNTUA-Oil Technological & Pharmaceutical Research Institute Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for students who want to build their career with good placements.

content.Placements: Presently, I am pursuing a Bachelor of Pharmacy at JNTUA Anantapur. My course will be completed in the year 2027. Past batches have got placements for 80% of students of our course in top companies and MNCs, like SunPharma, Cipla, etc. 50% of students get internship opportunities from our college.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure, and the environment provided in our college, with well-established labs and a Wi-Fi campus, with a library. The hostel facilities are decent, and the mess and canteen facilities are also good. Many students participate in sports and compete in national-level tournaments.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Why should we choose JNTUA OTPRI for a pharmacy course?

content.Placements: JNTUA OTPRI is a college under the central government, which is better to be under it rather than the state government colleges, as it has more dominance compared to the other autonomous and state government colleges. So, I recommend this college for them.
content.Infrastructure: Well-experienced staff are present here with a good atmosphere, friendly environment, etc. The people are good, helping us to study and do experiments in the lab with all the equipment available in the labs. There are good programs in the college for all occasions.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: In this college, placements should be more, and the infrastructure is good.

content.Placements: Around half of the students in each batch are placed. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA for fresher. The lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Parexel and Accenture are the top recruiting companies in this course. The top roles offered are clinical data associate and clinical pharmacist. Placements should be improved more in this college.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, laboratories and libraries are well-equipped. The quality of food served in the hostel is well-maintained. Sports are encouraged. But everything should be improved more for students. Other facilities other than food are good in the hostel. The hostel environment is good and friendly.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: This is the college of contract based education.

content.Placements: In this college, no companies will conduct the drive. The students on the campus are expecting more but the college faculty members are being failed to provide those facilities.
content.Infrastructure: The building of this college is very old, and the facilities are also not good. The Wi-Fi is not available, and there is a library, undeveloped laboratories are also provided, and a low number of classes are there. The college does not have a hostel and canteen. The sports facility is sufficient for the strength of the class.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are prominent. Some are masters completed and some are having their PhDs. In this college, they do not provide any workshops and also won't take students on any industrial tours, when students come out of college they have to go for training classes to acquire knowledge of the industry.

individual_reviews.course: M. Pharma in Pharmaceutical Chemistry - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because of faculty members, good placements, and better infrastructure.

content.Placements: Most of the students get placed in our course. The salary package offered varies from 2.5-3.0 LPA in our course. Our course students got placed in top companies like Dr. Reddy's Laboratories, Sun Pharmaceutical, Aurobindo, Singen, etc. Almost all students from our course got an internship in companies like Ranbaxy, Divis, and Lupin. The roles offered in our course are QA, QC, research and development, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is well equipped with labs, large classrooms, a library, computers, etc. There is no hostel and canteen. Medical facilities are provided inside the college. Sports and games are very much encouraged on our campus. Many students went to district and state-level selection for games like volleyball, cricket, badminton, etc.

college_info.college_name: Burdwan Dental College And Hospital: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Cutoff, Reviews

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Burdwan Dental College And Hospital.

review_content.Placements: In my batch, there are 125 students who have taken admission in BDS course 2023-2024. Most of the classes are held at Burdwan Medical College and Hospital because most of the subjects are similar to MBBS in the first year. 100% of students go for internships with a stipend of 30k. After that, 1-2 years of housemanship with a stipend of 50k.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are separate labs, but not at a high level. There is a library, classrooms with fans. No Wi-Fi availability. The playground is common for local people and college students, but there is no specific college playground present. No hostel facilities are available. The canteen is available but very costly (fish thali for 60rs, which is available for 50rs outside the college). Only one canteen is present. There are three buildings in the college: one for academics, the others are for the hospital and practical labs, ticket counter. The patient flow is around 200 in a day.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Hostel not available, only academics. Course is 1 to 4 years, 1 year internship with a 40k salary.

review_content.Placements: There is a 100% internship for doctors during the one-year junior residency. Around 500 patients come with different teeth problems. Medicines are given freely. Due to the low number of intern doctors, patients have to wait for one month for RCT and RPD. People come from different areas of West Bengal.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is not very large. There are only three buildings, two for the hospital and one fully for academics. Hostel facilities are available, but students live in rented rooms around the college within walking distance. One playground is attached to the college building.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college.

review_content.Placements: 70% of students are placed in the course. The highest salary is Rs.52,000. About 90% of students get internships. Every occasion is celebrated warmly and beautifully. There is no partiality in the college. Doctors, staff, and teachers are very helpful towards the students, and their behavior towards them is very mannered.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is AC in the library, staff room, and almost every department except in the practical room. The hostel is also very good, with high-quality food at a very reasonable price. They also maintain hygiene. Every student is treated well by the canteen staff.

individual_reviews.title: Burdwan Dental College Guide.

content.Placements: The college doesn't provide any further jobs as other regular government health-based colleges and universities. The patient flow and exposure is truly at peak. You get to look, learn, and treat hundreds of patients during your studying 5 years of course.
content.Infrastructure: The college, as of now (5 November 2024), still lacks a proper hostel for the students, internship, and even working junior resident doctors. The college has no ground of its own till now and only has two buildings designed. One being around a hundred years old that's very risky to even stay in.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am really amazed by the faculties of Burdwan Dental College and Hospital.

content.Placements: Education-wise, Burdwan Dental College and Hospital is the best dental college in West Bengal. The passed-out students from this college have very good skills and patient knowledge so most of them are running their own clinics and chambers with flood of patients coming for consultancy.
content.Infrastructure: You will find all the things required for this course: in library, all the books are available and the borrowing system is simple and easy , in mess, the food is good and the prices are reasonable, the classrooms are all newly made and too good , for sports and games, we have our ground beside college and also common room where you can play indoor games.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Burdwan Dental College And Hospital.

content.Placements: In my batch, there are 125 students who have taken admission in BDS course 2023-2024. Most of the classes are held at Burdwan Medical College and Hospital because most of the subjects are similar to MBBS in the first year. 100% of students go for internships with a stipend of 30k. After that, 1-2 years of housemanship with a stipend of 50k.
content.Infrastructure: There are separate labs, but not at a high level. There is a library, classrooms with fans. No Wi-Fi availability. The playground is common for local people and college students, but there is no specific college playground present. No hostel facilities are available. The canteen is available but very costly (fish thali for 60rs, which is available for 50rs outside the college). Only one canteen is present. There are three buildings in the college: one for academics, the others are for the hospital and practical labs, ticket counter. The patient flow is around 200 in a day.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Hostel not available, only academics. Course is 1 to 4 years, 1 year internship with a 40k salary.

content.Placements: There is a 100% internship for doctors during the one-year junior residency. Around 500 patients come with different teeth problems. Medicines are given freely. Due to the low number of intern doctors, patients have to wait for one month for RCT and RPD. People come from different areas of West Bengal.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus is not very large. There are only three buildings, two for the hospital and one fully for academics. Hostel facilities are available, but students live in rented rooms around the college within walking distance. One playground is attached to the college building.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college.

content.Placements: 70% of students are placed in the course. The highest salary is Rs.52,000. About 90% of students get internships. Every occasion is celebrated warmly and beautifully. There is no partiality in the college. Doctors, staff, and teachers are very helpful towards the students, and their behavior towards them is very mannered.
content.Infrastructure: There is AC in the library, staff room, and almost every department except in the practical room. The hostel is also very good, with high-quality food at a very reasonable price. They also maintain hygiene. Every student is treated well by the canteen staff.

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Veterinary College & Research Institute, Tirunelveli - Tamil Nadu Veterinary And Animal Sciences University Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Veterinary College & Research Institute, Tirunelveli - Tamil Nadu Veterinary And Animal Sciences University is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Science. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as BVSC. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include MVSC. The fee structure for the Veterinary College & Research Institute, Tirunelveli - Tamil Nadu Veterinary And Animal Sciences University programmes is around INR 20,000 to 44,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Veterinary College & Research Institute, Tirunelveli - Tamil Nadu Veterinary And Animal Sciences University provides programmes including BVSC, MVSC in streams such as Science, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Veterinary Science.
faqs.question: Which courses does Veterinary College & Research Institute, Tirunelveli - Tamil Nadu Veterinary And Animal Sciences University offer?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Sciences and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & AH) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It has an excellent infrastructure and provides good lab facilities.

review_content.Placements: Almost 90% of students get placed in government or private jobs with satisfying salary packages. The most common jobs are veterinary assistant surgeons and jobs in Aavin, poultry industries, feed industries, pharmaceutical companies, etc. Many students are placed in union and state public service.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has well-equipped laboratories. It has five gallery-type lecture halls and a library with many books. There are separate grounds for cricket and football. There are facilities for volleyball, Kho-Kho, badminton, shuttle, and table tennis. Hostels available for boys and girls are congested. There are separate mess facilities. There is a teaching veterinary clinical complex to expose students to clinical cases.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Sciences and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & AH) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The course provided are good but, situated in rural area, you can get only limited facilities.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement within the campus. But there are many job opportunities outside. You can write government exams for veterinary assistance service after completing UG and if you clear it, you can get a government job at the age of 24. So you can take the course BVSC & AH wholeheartedly.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college and hostel both are good but the hostel maintenance is poor. The quality of the food is not so poor. Somedays, the food may not be good but most of the days, the food is good. Non-vegetarian food is provided every day. The mess charge is high around Rs.5000 per month.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Sciences and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & AH) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the good library, teachers, and best practicals.

content.Placements: 75 percent of students are placed. 7 LPA is the highest package, 4 LPA is the lowest, and 5 LPA is the average package. Suguna, Venkatesh chicken, ambulance, dairy industries, Aavin, etc. are the top recruiters. 100 percent of students got internships. Doctors, clinicians, veterinarians, etc., are the top roles offered. In the internship, we got around an 11k stipend, which is less.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure with libraries around 10,000 books are available in our college library. The hostel was good with food and the mess bill is high due to extra but it is manageable. I like our hostel and the warden is good and friendly. He is a gem and Dean is the best.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Sciences and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & AH) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of Veterinary College & Research Institute, Tirunelveli.

content.Placements: Around 80% of the students are placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 20 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 7 LPA. The average salary package offered is 12 LPA. Top recruitment companies for our course are poultry industries, bio-sys department, various NGOs, and dairy farms. Around 70% of the students got internships. Top roles are offered in dairy farms.
content.Infrastructure: There are separate departments for each subject and unit. Classrooms are also separated for each graduating year. There is a good ventilated library with various types of books available. About hostels, there are separate buildings for boys and girls, good toilets and bathrooms. In each room has 1 fan and two almeras for clothes, and personal things. For sports, all types of game grounds are provided.
